calculates the 30-year compound interest if invested instead →
decides not to buy it.
en.editorNote: Send to your friend after their latest impulse purchase — let them figure out their spending personality
variations: A Pisces spends all their money on other people: meals, gifts, surprises. Their savings account is a mystery, but the joy is real.
A Scorpio's spending philosophy: buy the best or don't buy at all. The middle ground is its own kind of torture.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their weekend plans — homebodies, social butterflies, and the chronically last-minute; relatable lifestyle humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座週末的真實樣貌：

巨蟹座：
禮拜五晚上就回家了，
窩在沙發上追劇配泡麵，
門鈴響了會嚇一跳。
（其實只是外送。）

獅子座：
禮拜三開始規劃週末行程，
包含造型、餐廳、拍照地點、限時動態文案。
禮拜五出門前換了八套衣服。

天秤座：
朋友揪三個飯局都答應，
結果三個都不想去，
最後傳訊息：「我臨時有事，下次！」（其實在床上滑手機）

處女座：
禮拜六早上九點開始打掃，
下午整理衣櫃，晚上洗床單，
禮拜天累到只想躺著——這就是他們的休息。

射手座：
禮拜五晚上突然決定隔天出國，
禮拜六早上人已經在機場，
禮拜天回來繼續上班，毫無時差感。

水瓶座：
手機關靜音，三天不回任何訊息。
沒有人知道他在做什麼，
他自己也說不清楚——可能在思考宇宙吧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週五下午傳給朋友，附上「你這週末是哪一種」
variations: 牡羊座的週末計畫永遠是「臨時揪一下」，揪到了就出門，沒揪到就睡到下午三點。
雙子座週末會同時答應五個聚會，最後會去哪一個取決於當天起床的心情。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign's weekend actually looks like:

Cancer:
Home by Friday night,
curled up on the couch with a show and instant noodles.
Doorbell rings → mild panic.
(It's just delivery.)

Leo:
Starts planning the weekend on Wednesday:
outfit, restaurant, photo spot, story caption.
Changes clothes eight times before leaving Friday.

Libra:
Says yes to three different dinner invites,
doesn't actually want to go to any of them,
texts: 'Something came up, next time!'
(Actually scrolling in bed.)

Virgo:
Starts cleaning at 9am Saturday,
organizes the closet in the afternoon, washes sheets at night.
Sunday they're so tired they just lie down — that's their rest.

Sagittarius:
Decides Friday night to fly somewhere tomorrow.
Saturday morning, already at the airport.
Sunday, back at work, no jet lag, somehow fine.

Aquarius:
Phone on silent, doesn't reply for three days.
Nobody knows what they're doing.
They can't really explain it either — probably contemplating the universe.
en.editorNote: Send Friday afternoon with 'which one are you this weekend?'
variations: Aries's weekend plan is always 'let's see who's free.' If someone's free, they're out. If not, they sleep until 3pm.
A Gemini will RSVP yes to five different events. Which one they actually attend depends entirely on Saturday morning's mood.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their stress responses — overthinkers, deniers, and panic-cleaners; relatable mental health humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座有壓力時的反應：

處女座：
開始整理房間。
壓力越大越乾淨。
如果你看到處女座在重新分類書架，代表他人生正在崩潰。

雙魚座：
躲進被窩，
聽悲傷的歌，
邊哭邊覺得自己很有藝術感。
哭完繼續難過，但氛圍很美。

摩羯座：
表面冷靜如常。
內心其實已經跑了七套災難應對方案。
沒人看得出來他在崩潰，包括他自己。

牡羊座：
直接爆炸，把問題吼出來，
吼完五分鐘後就忘了，
別人還在驚魂未定，他已經在點外送。

天蠍座：
不說話，不解釋，不發洩。
看起來沒事，其實內心在做風暴。
等他願意開口的時候，事情已經過去三個月了。

水瓶座：
壓力大就消失。
不接電話，不回訊息，不出門，
三天後突然回來說：「我剛才在思考人生。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近壓力很大的朋友，告訴他不孤單——大家都用奇怪的方式在撐
variations: 雙子座壓力大會一直說話，講到自己都不知道在說什麼——重點是不能停下來思考。
巨蟹座壓力大會吃東西，吃完更焦慮，焦慮完繼續吃，是一個無限循環。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign reacts to stress:

Virgo:
Starts cleaning.
The more stress, the cleaner the house.
If you see a Virgo reorganizing their bookshelf, their life is falling apart.

Pisces:
Disappears under the blanket,
puts on sad music,
cries while feeling artistically beautiful about it.
Still sad after, but the vibe is immaculate.

Capricorn:
Looks completely calm on the outside.
Internally already ran seven disaster scenarios.
Nobody can tell they're spiraling — including them.

Aries:
Explodes immediately, yells the problem out loud,
forgets about it five minutes later,
orders takeout while everyone else is still recovering.

Scorpio:
Doesn't talk, doesn't explain, doesn't vent.
Looks fine, but internally? A category 5 hurricane.
By the time they open up, it's been three months.

Aquarius:
Stress = vanish.
No calls, no texts, no human contact.
Returns three days later: 'I was just contemplating life.'
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's stressed lately — tell them they're not alone, everyone copes weirdly
variations: Gemini under stress just keeps talking — about anything, everything, nothing. The point is to not let the brain stop and think.
Cancer under stress eats. Eats more when anxious. Eats more about being anxious about eating. It's an infinite loop.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their roles in a friend group — the planner, the chaos agent, the listener, the ghost; relatable group dynamic humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座在朋友群組裡的角色：

獅子座：
群組的主角。
發了什麼都希望大家立刻回應，
沒人回會傳：「都沒人嗎？哈囉？」

摩羯座：
群組的主辦人。
揪聚餐、訂位、收錢、提醒大家準時，
做完發現自己最不想出門。

雙子座：
群組的話題製造機。
從早到晚都在丟新訊息，
從股市聊到鬼故事再聊到午餐吃什麼。

天秤座：
群組的和事佬。
有人吵架立刻緩頰，
結束後私下傳訊息給雙方：「我覺得他也沒有惡意啦……」

金牛座：
群組的潛水王。
三天才冒一次泡，內容只有一個貼圖。
但你揪吃飯他會出現，揪喝下午茶他會出現——
只要有食物，他在。

水瓶座：
群組的幽靈。
從來不知道他什麼時候進來、什麼時候離開、
他到底有沒有看訊息。
但他會突然在凌晨三點回一則三天前的訊息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 丟到朋友群組，看大家對號入座的速度有多快
variations: 巨蟹座是群組裡的暖心擔當，誰心情不好他第一個發現，但他自己心情不好的時候不會說。
射手座是群組裡的點火者，揪出國揪冒險揪夜衝，雖然真的成行的機率只有十分之一。

en.content:
Each zodiac sign's role in the group chat:

Leo:
The main character.
Expects immediate reactions to everything they post.
If no one replies: 'Hello?? Anyone??'

Capricorn:
The organizer.
Plans the dinner, books the table, collects money, reminds everyone to be on time —
then realizes they're the one who least wants to go.

Gemini:
The topic generator.
Messages from morning to midnight,
jumps from stocks to ghost stories to 'what's for lunch.'

Libra:
The peacemaker.
Defuses every argument in real time,
then DMs both sides separately: 'I don't think they meant it that way...'

Taurus:
The lurker.
Surfaces once every three days with a single sticker.
But invite them to dinner? They're there. Brunch? There.
If food is involved, Taurus appears.

Aquarius:
The ghost.
Nobody knows when they joined, when they left, or if they're reading anything.
But they'll randomly reply to a three-day-old message at 3am.
en.editorNote: Drop this in the group chat and watch how fast everyone gets called out
variations: Cancer is the emotional support of the group chat. They notice when anyone's down — but when they themselves are down, they say nothing.
Sagittarius is the chaos starter: 'Let's go abroad,' 'Let's road trip tonight,' 'Let's quit our jobs.' Actual follow-through rate: 1 in 10.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their texting habits — read receipts, slow replies, voice notes; everyday digital communication humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座傳訊息的真實樣貌：

牡羊座：
一秒回十句，每句都不超過五個字。
你還沒看完前面，他下一個話題又開了。
打字速度比思考速度快。

金牛座：
已讀三天才回。
回了還只有「嗯」、「好」、「OK」。
你以為他生氣，其實他真的沒事，就是懶得打字。

雙子座：
一個話題講到一半突然丟新話題，
再丟一個迷因、再丟一張新聞截圖、
你回到第一個問題的時候他已經忘記了。

處女座：
打了三段、刪了五次、改了標點，
最後傳出去的那則訊息語意精準、結構完整、
而且通常是「好」。

天蠍座：
已讀不回是日常。
他不是在冷處理你，他是在思考要怎麼回。
（思考了三天還沒結論。）

水瓶座：
凌晨三點突然丟一篇兩萬字的文章，
附註：「我覺得你會喜歡。」
你打開連結是量子物理。
zh-tw.editorNote: 丟到群組裡，看大家對自己的傳訊習慣有多誠實
variations: 射手座傳訊息超愛用語音，三十秒的內容硬要用兩分鐘的語音傳，重點是中間還會笑場兩次。
巨蟹座的訊息結尾永遠有顆愛心或可愛貼圖，連跟你說「我先睡了」都要附上一張小熊揮手。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign actually does in your texts:

Aries:
Sends ten messages in a row, all under five words.
You're still reading the first one when they jump to a new topic.
Types faster than they think.

Taurus:
Reads your text. Replies three days later.
With just 'k' or 'sounds good.'
You think they're upset. They're not. They just hate typing.

Gemini:
Starts a topic, abandons it halfway, drops a meme,
followed by a news screenshot, then a voice note,
by the time you circle back to the original question, they've forgotten it existed.

Virgo:
Drafts three paragraphs, deletes five times, fixes the punctuation,
the final sent message is grammatically perfect, structurally clean,
and usually just says 'okay.'

Scorpio:
Leaving you on read is the default state.
They're not ghosting you, they're thinking about how to reply.
(Still thinking. It's been three days.)

Aquarius:
Drops a 20,000-word article at 3am with the note:
'You'll probably like this.'
You open the link. It's about quantum physics.
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat — see who's brave enough to admit it's them
variations: Sagittarius loves voice notes. Will turn a 30-second message into a 2-minute audio, complete with cracking up at their own joke twice.
A Cancer's text always ends with a heart or cute sticker. Even 'going to bed now' comes with a tiny waving bear.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs when angry — explosive, silent treatment, passive aggressive; relatable conflict-style humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座生氣的方式：

牡羊座：
當下爆炸，吼完就忘了。
五分鐘後傳訊息：「欸晚上要不要吃宵夜？」
你還在情緒裡，他已經沒事。

金牛座：
表面沒事。
但他心裡的小本本已經寫下了。
半年後突然提起：「你那次說的話我還記得喔。」

獅子座：
當著所有人的面說清楚。
要的不是道歉，是面子。
如果你願意承認他是對的，事情立刻結束。

處女座：
不吵架，直接列出你做錯的二十三件事。
條列式，附編號，按時間排序。
你看完之後沒辦法反駁，因為他全部都對。

天秤座：
表面笑笑說「沒關係啦」，
回家之後反覆想了七遍，
最後決定再也不要約你。（你還不知道發生什麼事。）

摩羯座：
生氣的方式是更冷淡、更專業、更有效率。
你問他怎麼了，他說「沒事」，
但他從那之後再也沒主動傳過訊息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近跟人吵架的朋友，幫他理解對方為什麼那樣反應
variations: 雙魚座生氣會哭，哭完還是會原諒你，但他心裡那個傷不會消失，只是被他自己藏起來了。
天蠍座生氣很安靜，但記得很久。三年後你以為大家都忘了，只有他還記得當初每一個細節。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign actually gets mad:

Aries:
Explodes immediately, yells, gets it all out.
Five minutes later: 'Hey, late-night snack run?'
You're still upset. They've moved on.

Taurus:
Looks fine.
But they've already written it down in their internal notebook.
Six months later: 'Remember what you said that one time?'

Leo:
Will confront you publicly, in front of everyone.
They don't want an apology — they want their pride back.
Admit they were right and it's over instantly.

Virgo:
Doesn't fight. Just lists the 23 things you did wrong.
Bullet-pointed, numbered, in chronological order.
You can't argue back because they're factually correct on every point.

Libra:
Smiles and says 'it's totally fine,'
thinks about it seven times after they get home,
quietly decides to never invite you to anything again. (You have no idea why.)

Capricorn:
Gets angry by becoming colder, more professional, more efficient.
You ask if anything's wrong. They say 'nothing.'
They never text you first again.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who just had a fight — help them decode the other person's reaction
variations: Pisces cries when angry, then forgives you anyway, but the wound stays — just buried where you can't see it.
Scorpio's anger is silent but long-lasting. Three years later, everyone else has forgotten. Scorpio still remembers every detail.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs in early dating — flirting styles, awkwardness, intensity levels; relatable romance humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座的曖昧期樣貌：

牡羊座：
喜歡你就直接告訴你，第三天就問：「我們是什麼關係？」
沒有試探，沒有欲擒故縱，他覺得那很浪費時間。

金牛座：
慢慢來，慢到你以為他根本沒興趣。
但他每一次的「順路請你喝咖啡」都是計畫過的。

雙子座：
每天傳訊息傳到深夜，話題從哲學聊到便利商店新品。
你以為你們很有默契——他對五個人都這樣。

巨蟹座：
還沒在一起就開始想「以後我們」。
第一次約會就在腦中跑完三十年的劇本。
（不會說出來，但會默默準備。）

處女座：
喜歡你的時候會表現得特別冷淡，
因為他害怕被發現自己其實很在意。
結果你以為他不喜歡你，事情就這樣結束了。

天蠍座：
不主動，但會默默觀察你三個月。
等他確定你值得的時候，會突然出現得很果斷，
讓你完全沒有反應時間。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近在曖昧的朋友，讓他對照對方的星座猜對方在想什麼
variations: 射手座曖昧期超快樂，但一旦你提到「定下來」三個字，他可能就消失三天讓你體會什麼叫自由。
水瓶座曖昧的方式是傳奇怪的迷因給你，如果你看得懂他的笑點，恭喜，你過第一關了。

en.content:
What the situationship phase looks like for each zodiac sign:

Aries:
Likes you, tells you, day three asks: 'So what are we?'
No games, no playing hard to get — they consider that a waste of time.

Taurus:
Moves slow. So slow you start to think they don't like you.
But every 'I was in the area, want to grab coffee?' was carefully planned.

Gemini:
Texts you until 3am, conversations going from philosophy to new convenience store snacks.
You think you have a special connection — they do this with five people.

Cancer:
Not dating yet but already imagining 'us in the future.'
First date, mentally runs through a 30-year movie of your life together.
(Won't tell you. Will quietly start preparing.)

Virgo:
Acts especially cold when they like you,
because they're terrified you'll find out they care.
You think they're not interested. The whole thing ends right there.

Scorpio:
Doesn't make moves, but silently watches you for three months.
Once they decide you're worth it, they show up decisively, all at once,
and you have zero time to react.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend in a situationship — help them decode their crush's behavior by sign
variations: Sagittarius loves the talking stage, but say the words 'commitment' or 'define this' and they vanish for three days so you can really appreciate freedom.
An Aquarius's flirting strategy is sending you weird memes. If you get the joke, congratulations — you passed round one.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their decision-making styles — overthinkers, gut-followers, list-makers, deniers; relatable everyday humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座做決定的方式：

牡羊座：
不思考，憑感覺。
決定錯了也沒關係，再做一個就好。
人生不能停在猶豫上太久。

天秤座：
光是「中午吃什麼」就要思考一個半小時。
問十個朋友的意見，最後選一個都沒有人推薦的。

處女座：
做決定前先列優缺點表格，
優點欄五個，缺點欄三十個，
結論：兩個選項都不行，重新想。

射手座：
當下覺得對就決定。
下個月後悔了也沒關係，
那是「未來的我」要處理的事，跟現在的他無關。

摩羯座：
從利弊、長期影響、五年計畫的角度分析。
做完決定再花三天確認，
確認完才執行——但他的決定通常都是對的。

雙魚座：
做不出來。
問所有人意見之後更混亂，
最後拖到事情自己解決，鬆一口氣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是在「我等等再決定」的朋友，希望他看完之後能快點選一個
variations: 金牛座做決定很慢，但決定之後絕對不改，就算後來發現錯了也是「那也是我選的」。
雙子座的決定每五分鐘換一次，所以重要的事情不要問雙子，問了你會更亂。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign actually makes decisions:

Aries:
Doesn't think. Goes with the gut.
Wrong decision? Make another one. Easy.
Life can't stay stuck in 'maybe' for long.

Libra:
'What's for lunch' takes 90 minutes of internal debate.
Asks ten friends for opinions, then picks the one nobody recommended.

Virgo:
Makes a pros-and-cons list before any decision.
Five pros, thirty cons.
Conclusion: both options are bad, start over.

Sagittarius:
Feels right in the moment? Decided.
Regrets it next month? That's a problem for 'future me.'
Not today's responsibility.

Capricorn:
Analyzes pros, cons, long-term impact, five-year plan.
Makes the decision, then spends three more days confirming.
Finally executes — but they're usually right.

Pisces:
Can't decide.
Asks everyone for input, becomes more confused.
Waits long enough that the situation resolves itself. Sighs in relief.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who's always saying 'I'll decide later' — hopefully it speeds them up
variations: Taurus decides slowly, but once decided, never changes their mind. Even if it turns out wrong: 'I picked it. That's the choice.'
Gemini changes their decision every five minutes. Don't ask a Gemini about anything important — you'll just get more confused.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs morning routines — fire signs jump out of bed, earth signs follow strict routines, water signs hit snooze; relatable everyday humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座的早晨樣貌：

牡羊座：
鬧鐘還沒響就醒了，跳下床開始今天的「人生計畫」。
邊刷牙邊規劃如何征服世界，七點半已經跑完三公里。

金牛座：
鬧鐘響了，按掉。再響，再按。
第七次之後不情願地起床，第一件事是想：晚餐要吃什麼？

處女座：
六點起床，按照標準流程：拉伸、保養、早餐、確認待辦清單。
如果其中任何一個環節被打亂，他整天都不對勁。

天秤座：
躺在床上滑手機四十分鐘，糾結今天要穿什麼。
最後選了第一套換掉的那件，遲到十五分鐘。

天蠍座：
醒了但不起床。安靜地躺在那裡想昨天那個人說的話到底什麼意思。
等他終於起床的時候，已經完成了三個版本的回應草稿。

雙魚座：
鬧鐘？什麼鬧鐘？我有設嗎？
醒來發現已經中午了，第一個反應是：「沒關係，今天從現在開始算就好。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給總是賴床的朋友，問他「你是哪一種早晨」
variations: 獅子座的早晨從照鏡子開始，要先確認今天的造型可以見人，才能出門面對世界。
摩羯座五點半就坐在書桌前了，當你還在賴床的時候，他已經完成兩個工作項目。

en.content:
What mornings actually look like for each zodiac sign:

Aries:
Wakes up before the alarm, leaps out of bed, ready to conquer the day.
Plans world domination while brushing teeth. Has already run 3K by 7:30am.

Taurus:
Alarm rings. Snooze. Rings again. Snooze.
After the seventh attempt, reluctantly gets up. First thought: what's for dinner?

Virgo:
Up at 6am, executing the standard protocol: stretch, skincare, breakfast, review to-do list.
If any step gets disrupted, the entire day feels off.

Libra:
Lies in bed scrolling for 40 minutes, agonizing over what to wear.
Ends up wearing the first outfit they tried on. Fifteen minutes late.

Scorpio:
Awake but not getting up. Quietly lying there analyzing what that person meant yesterday.
By the time they finally get out of bed, they've drafted three versions of a response.

Pisces:
Alarm? What alarm? Did I even set one?
Wakes up and it's noon. First thought: 'It's fine, the day starts now.'
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who always sleeps in. Ask them: which morning are you?
variations: Leo's morning starts with the mirror. Has to confirm today's look is presentable before facing the world.
Capricorn's at their desk by 5:30am. While you're still snoozing, they've already finished two work tasks.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and procrastination styles — Pisces daydreams, Gemini distracted, Sagittarius bored; relatable productivity humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座拖延的方式：

雙魚座：
打開電腦準備工作，結果先看了一支貓咪影片。
兩小時後抬頭，YouTube已經演算法到外星人陰謀論。
工作？什麼工作？

雙子座：
同時開十五個分頁，每個都進行到一半。
寫文案寫到一半去查資料，查資料又開始回訊息，
回訊息回到一半想到要訂晚餐。最後什麼都沒完成。

射手座：
「等我有靈感再做。」
靈感從來沒來，但週末突然想去爬山的衝動倒是來了三次。

天秤座：
為了「先準備好心情」花了一整天整理桌面、買新文具、聽 lo-fi 歌單。
隔天一打開檔案發現靈感都消失了。

摩羯座：
不會拖延工作，但會拖延打給家人、回約會邀約、處理感情問題。
工作以外的事情，全部都是「明天再說」。

牡羊座：
答應的時候充滿熱情，三天後完全失去興趣。
但他不會說出來，會等到 deadline 前一晚才驚醒：「啊，那件事還沒做。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「我等等就做」結果三週後還沒開始的朋友
variations: 處女座不是拖延，是「準備到完美才開始」——結果準備了三個月還沒動筆，因為還不夠完美。
金牛座拖延是因為他覺得「現在做也是做，明天做也是做，那為什麼要現在」。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign actually procrastinates:

Pisces:
Opens laptop to work. Watches one cat video first.
Two hours later, the YouTube algorithm has reached alien conspiracy theories.
Work? What work?

Gemini:
Has 15 tabs open, all halfway through.
Starts writing copy, opens a tab to research, starts replying to messages,
then remembers to order dinner. Finishes nothing.

Sagittarius:
'I'll do it when inspiration hits.'
Inspiration never arrives, but the urge to go hiking has hit three times this weekend.

Libra:
Spends a whole day 'getting in the mood' — organizing the desk, buying new stationery, curating a lo-fi playlist.
Next day, opens the file and the inspiration is gone.

Capricorn:
Never procrastinates on work. Procrastinates on calling family, replying to date invites, dealing with feelings.
Anything that isn't work is 'tomorrow's problem.'

Aries:
Agrees with full enthusiasm, completely loses interest three days later.
Won't say so. Will wake up the night before deadline panicking: 'Oh, I haven't started that.'
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who says 'I'll start in a sec' and three weeks later still hasn't
variations: Virgo doesn't procrastinate — they 'prepare until it's perfect.' Three months in, still preparing. Still not perfect enough.
Taurus procrastinates because: 'Doing it now or doing it tomorrow is the same work. Why now?'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs at parties — Leo dancing, Cancer in the corner, Aquarius observing; relatable social humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座在派對上的位置：

獅子座：
中央舞池，發光發熱，全場焦點。
如果沒人看他，他會主動製造機會讓大家看。

巨蟹座：
角落沙發，跟一兩個熟人聊很深的話題。
中途偷偷離開兩次去廁所滑手機冷靜一下。

水瓶座：
站在旁邊觀察大家，像在做田野調查。
你問他在想什麼，他會說：「人類真有趣。」

雙子座：
認識每一個人，跟每個人都聊得很開心。
隔天你問他昨天那個人叫什麼，他會說：「啊，我忘了。」

處女座：
本來不想來，被拖來之後在心裡列每個人的缺點清單。
微笑著喝飲料，腦中已經規劃好怎麼提早離開。

金牛座：
直接坐在食物旁邊，從頭吃到尾。
他來派對的目的就是吃，社交是順便的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到群組讓朋友對號入座，順便引發「你是哪一個」大戰
variations: 天秤座是那個跟所有人都拍照的，因為他不想冷落任何一個人，結果累到回家直接昏倒。
摩羯座只待半小時就走了，理由：「我明天還要早起。」其實他只是不想待太久。

en.content:
Where each zodiac sign actually is at a party:

Leo:
Dead center of the dance floor, glowing, everyone watching.
If no one's watching, will create a moment so they have to.

Cancer:
Corner couch, having a deep conversation with one or two close friends.
Sneaks off to the bathroom twice to scroll their phone and recharge.

Aquarius:
Standing to the side observing everyone, like field research.
Ask what they're thinking. They say: 'Humans are fascinating.'

Gemini:
Knows everyone, having a great time with all of them.
Next day you ask what that person's name was. 'Oh. I forgot.'

Virgo:
Didn't want to come, got dragged here, mentally compiling a list of each person's flaws.
Smiles, sips drink, already planned the early exit.

Taurus:
Parked next to the food. Eating from start to finish.
They came for the snacks. Socializing is a side quest.
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat. Watch the 'which one are you' debate begin.
variations: Libra is the one taking photos with everyone — doesn't want anyone to feel left out. Goes home so exhausted they collapse.
Capricorn stays 30 minutes and leaves. Excuse: 'Early morning tomorrow.' Truth: they just didn't want to stay longer.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and money habits — spenders, savers, impulse buyers, investors; relatable financial humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座花錢的方式：

金牛座：
買的東西一定要值得，比價三個禮拜才下手。
買完之後珍惜十年，連包裝盒都還留著。

獅子座：
買的不是商品，是面子。
寧願刷卡分期，也要那個 logo 看得見的款式。

射手座：
看到喜歡就買，不看價錢。
月底發現帳戶剩八百塊，但他笑笑說：「沒關係，下個月再賺。」

處女座：
Excel 表格記每一筆開銷，連便利商店買口香糖都記。
月底看著表格分析自己「為什麼飲料花了一千二」，然後下個月還是花一千二。

摩羯座：
從二十歲開始存錢，三十歲已經有三個投資組合。
但連請朋友吃飯都會在心裡計算性價比。

雙魚座：
錢的概念對他來說很模糊。
看到捐款廣告會哭著捐三千，看到自己沒錢的時候才想起來：「啊，我上個月做了什麼？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個月底總是哭窮的朋友，他可能會說「對啊我就是雙魚」
variations: 天秤座花錢買的是「氛圍感」——香氛蠟燭、ig 風格餐具、好看的衣架，使用過一次就被遺忘。
天蠍座花錢很沉默，但每一筆都有計劃。他不會炫富，但他的存款可能比你想像的多很多。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign actually spends money:

Taurus:
Whatever they buy must be worth it. Compares prices for three weeks before pulling the trigger.
Then cherishes the item for a decade. Still has the original packaging.

Leo:
Not buying the product — buying the prestige.
Will happily put it on a payment plan, as long as the logo is clearly visible.

Sagittarius:
Sees something they like, buys it. Doesn't check the price.
End of month, account at $25. Smiles and says: 'It's fine, I'll earn more next month.'

Virgo:
Tracks every expense in a spreadsheet — even gum from the corner store.
Reviews it monthly: 'Why did I spend $40 on drinks?' Spends $40 on drinks again next month.

Capricorn:
Started saving at 20. Has three investment portfolios by 30.
But still mentally calculates the ROI when buying a friend dinner.

Pisces:
The concept of money is fuzzy for them.
Will cry at a charity ad and donate $100. Then notices their bank account: 'Wait, what did I do last month?'
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who's always broke by the 25th. They'll probably reply 'I am a Pisces yes'
variations: Libra spends on 'aesthetic' — the candle, the IG-worthy plates, the cute hangers. Used once. Forgotten.
Scorpio spends quietly, but every dollar has a plan. They won't flash wealth, but their savings are probably way bigger than you'd guess.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs and their texting habits — Gemini's late-night essays, Libra's exclamation-only outbox, Scorpio's typing-and-deleting; relatable communication humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座傳訊息的真實樣貌：

雙子座：
半夜兩點突然傳一段五百字的人生感悟，
隔天醒來覺得很丟臉，傳一句「沒事別在意」想蓋過去。

天秤座：
訊息列裡全是「！」「哈哈哈」「真假」，
沒有一句有實際內容，但每個朋友都覺得跟他很要好。

天蠍座：
打了又刪，刪了又打，重打了八次。
最後傳出去的是：「嗯。」

處女座：
回訊息前先在心裡校對三次，連標點符號都要對。
如果不小心打錯字，會立刻撤回，再傳一次正確的版本。

射手座：
已讀三天才回。
回的時候像什麼事都沒發生，從新話題開始聊。

巨蟹座：
看到對方在打字的「...」就開始緊張。
那三個點消失之後又出現，他已經想了五個版本的回應。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到群組讓朋友自首：「我就是那個刪刪改改的天蠍」
variations: 牡羊座傳訊息的特色是：想到什麼傳什麼，一次傳七封，每封都是兩個字。
金牛座的訊息回覆速度跟季節變化一樣慢，但他每一句都認真看過。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign actually texts:

Gemini:
Fires off a 500-word life manifesto at 2am.
Wakes up mortified, sends a quick 'lol nvm' to bury it.

Libra:
Entire chat history is just '!!', 'hahaha', and 'no waaay.'
Zero substance. Every friend somehow feels close to them.

Scorpio:
Types, deletes, retypes, deletes again. Eight drafts deep.
Final message sent: 'k.'

Virgo:
Proofreads every text three times before sending — punctuation included.
If there's a typo, immediate unsend, followed by the corrected version.

Sagittarius:
Leaves you on read for three days.
Replies like nothing happened, opens with a totally new topic.

Cancer:
Sees the typing dots and starts spiraling.
Dots disappear, reappear, disappear again. They've already drafted five different responses in their head.
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat. Watch someone confess: 'I'm the Scorpio with eight drafts'
variations: Aries texts like: thinks of something, sends it. Sends seven separate messages, each two words long.
Taurus replies at the speed of seasons changing — but they've genuinely read every word you sent.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs in group chats — Leo dominating, Virgo lurking, Sagittarius dropping random links; relatable group dynamic humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座在群組裡的角色：

獅子座：
群組裡發言最多的人，每個話題都能延伸出三個分支。
如果群組安靜超過半小時，他會主動丟梗圖救場。

處女座：
從來不發言，但已讀比誰都快。
偶爾出現一次，是為了糾正某個人打錯的字。

射手座：
隨機在凌晨三點丟一個怪連結，沒有上下文。
沒有人懂他在分享什麼，但他覺得很有趣就夠了。

摩羯座：
群組訊息超過五十則就直接已讀不回，
他覺得「重要的事情會被單獨告訴他」。

水瓶座：
突然冒出來說一個很有哲理的東西，全場沉默十分鐘，
然後他自己又消失了，留下大家思考人生。

雙魚座：
看到群組吵架就傳貼圖緩和氣氛。
如果氣氛太僵，他會私訊每一個人關心，當群組的情感調節器。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在你的死群裡丟出來，順便看誰會跳出來認領
variations: 金牛座的群組訊息特徵是：別人在聊什麼他都看，但只有提到食物的時候才會發言。
巨蟹座在群組裡是默默潛水的那個，但你生日的時候他會記得，準備好梗圖第一個傳出來。

en.content:
Each zodiac sign's role in the group chat:

Leo:
Top poster, hands down. Every topic spawns three sub-threads.
If the chat goes quiet for 30 minutes, drops a meme to revive it.

Virgo:
Never posts. Has the chat read before anyone else.
Only speaks up to correct someone's typo.

Sagittarius:
Drops a random unhinged link at 3am with zero context.
No one understands what they're sharing. They think it's funny, that's enough.

Capricorn:
Sees 50+ unread messages and immediately marks as read without scrolling.
Reasons: 'If it's important, someone will DM me directly.'

Aquarius:
Drops a deeply philosophical statement out of nowhere. Group goes silent for 10 minutes.
Then vanishes, leaving everyone questioning life.

Pisces:
Senses a fight brewing, sends a cute sticker to defuse.
If the vibe is really off, DMs everyone individually to check in. Group chat therapist.
en.editorNote: Drop this in your dead group chat. See who outs themselves first.
variations: Taurus's group chat behavior: reads everything, says nothing — unless food is mentioned, then suddenly very engaged.
Cancer is the silent lurker, but they'll remember your birthday and be the first one to post the meme.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs when stressed — Aries snaps, Cancer cries, Capricorn doubles down on work; relatable emotional response humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座壓力大的時候會做什麼：

牡羊座：
變得超級易怒，連咖啡機壞掉都要罵三分鐘。
運動兩小時之後恢復正常，假裝剛剛什麼都沒發生。

巨蟹座：
躲進房間哭，但不告訴任何人。
等你問他怎麼了，他會說「沒事」，然後又默默掉一滴眼淚。

處女座：
把書桌整理三次，把衣櫃重新分類，把手機 App 按顏色排好。
問題沒解決，但至少桌面看起來很整齊。

摩羯座：
壓力大的反應是工作更多。
別人在崩潰他在加班，他覺得忙起來就不用想那麼多。

雙魚座：
睡十二個小時，醒來看一部很催淚的電影哭一場，
然後吃一桶冰淇淋。問題還在那裡，但情緒被洗過了。

天蠍座：
外表完全看不出來，內心已經跑完三十種報復劇本。
你以為他沒事，其實他正在心裡寫小說。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近壓力大的朋友，問他「你是哪一種崩潰方式」
variations: 天秤座壓力大的時候會瘋狂購物，買一堆其實不需要的東西，買完後悔，後悔完繼續買。
射手座的解壓方式是訂機票，他覺得只要還能逃就沒問題，逃不掉就再訂一張。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign actually does when stressed:

Aries:
Gets irrationally angry. Coffee machine breaks? Three-minute rant.
Goes to the gym for two hours, returns acting like nothing happened.

Cancer:
Hides in their room and cries. Tells no one.
If you ask what's wrong, says 'nothing,' then quietly sheds another tear.

Virgo:
Reorganizes the desk three times. Resorts the closet. Color-codes phone apps.
Problem unsolved, but at least the desktop looks pristine.

Capricorn:
Responds to stress by working harder.
While others spiral, they pull overtime. Staying busy means not having to feel.

Pisces:
Sleeps for 12 hours. Wakes up, watches a sad movie, cries it out,
eats an entire pint of ice cream. Problem still exists, but emotions feel laundered.

Scorpio:
Looks completely unbothered. Internally has already plotted 30 revenge scenarios.
You think they're fine. They're writing a novel in their head.
en.editorNote: Send to a stressed friend. Ask: which breakdown style is yours?
variations: Libra's stress response is panic shopping. Buys things they don't need, regrets it, keeps buying.
Sagittarius copes by booking a flight. As long as escape is possible, things are fine. If not, book another flight.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs when ghosted — Scorpio investigates, Aries moves on instantly, Pisces rewrites the relationship in their head; relatable dating humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座被已讀不回的時候會做什麼：

牡羊座：
直接傳：「你到底是什麼意思？」
沒回？刪好友，封鎖，下一個。整個過程不到十分鐘。

天蠍座：
不會再傳訊息，但會默默打開他的 IG，限動一個都不錯過。
三個月後突然知道對方上週去了哪裡、跟誰吃飯、養的貓叫什麼名字。

雙魚座：
在腦中重新編寫整段關係：
「也許他只是太忙了。」「也許他手機壞了。」「也許這是命運的考驗。」
半年後還在等回覆。

處女座：
回去翻過去的對話，逐字分析自己哪句話說錯了。
結論：第三段第二句的標點符號用錯了，活該被已讀。

摩羯座：
第一時間就接受結果，把對方從聯絡人移除，繼續工作。
表面上完全沒事，但會默默對「感情」這件事關上一扇門。

雙子座：
馬上同時跟三個新對象開始聊。
等對方一週後回訊息，他已經完全忘記他是誰了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近被已讀的朋友，提醒他不是只有他這樣
variations: 巨蟹座被已讀的時候會把過去所有對話截圖存起來，當作「曾經被在乎過」的證據。
獅子座被已讀的時候會在限動發一張很美的自拍，配文：「有些人不值得。」

en.content:
What each zodiac sign does when ghosted:

Aries:
Texts directly: 'What's actually going on here?'
No reply? Unfollow, block, next. Whole process takes under 10 minutes.

Scorpio:
Won't text again. Will silently view every single one of their stories.
Three months later, knows exactly where they went last week, who they had dinner with, and the name of their cat.

Pisces:
Rewrites the entire relationship in their head:
'Maybe they're just busy.' 'Maybe their phone broke.' 'Maybe this is a test from the universe.'
Six months later, still waiting for a reply.

Virgo:
Scrolls back through the chat, analyzing every word they sent.
Conclusion: paragraph three, sentence two had a misplaced comma. They deserved this.

Capricorn:
Accepts it immediately. Removes the contact. Goes back to work.
Looks completely unaffected. Quietly closes another door labeled 'feelings.'

Gemini:
Starts texting three new people at once.
When the original person finally replies a week later, Gemini has genuinely forgotten who they are.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who just got ghosted. Remind them they're not alone.
variations: Cancer screenshots every old conversation as evidence: 'See? At one point, I mattered to someone.'
Leo posts a stunning selfie to their story with the caption: 'Some people don't deserve access.'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs texting habits — Aries spam, Virgo proofreads, Cancer writes essays; relatable digital communication humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座傳訊息的方式：

牡羊座：
一次傳七則，每則一句話。
你還沒讀完第一則他已經在罵你怎麼還沒回。

處女座：
打字十分鐘，刪掉重打，再讀三遍才按送出。
結果只是傳「好」這一個字。

巨蟹座：
一次傳兩百個字，從早餐吃什麼開始講起。
結尾還會問你「你今天過得好嗎？真的嗎？確定嗎？」

摩羯座：
所有訊息都用句號結尾，從來沒有貼圖。
你以為他在生氣，其實他只是在工作。

雙魚座：
傳一首歌、一張很美的照片、一個哭哭的貼圖。
你問他怎麼了？他說：「沒事，就是突然想到你。」

天蠍座：
你已讀他的訊息超過三十秒，他就知道你在猶豫怎麼回。
他不會催你，但會默默觀察你回的每一個字。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近被一堆訊息轟炸的朋友，問他「猜猜我是哪一種」
variations: 雙子座傳訊息一秒換三個話題，你還在回第一個，他已經跳到第五個了。
金牛座傳訊息很穩，但你想跟他聊天他要等下班、吃飽、洗完澡才會慢慢回。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign texts:

Aries:
Sends seven messages in a row, one sentence each.
Before you finish reading the first, they're already mad you haven't replied.

Virgo:
Types for ten minutes, deletes it, retypes, proofreads three times, hits send.
The message says 'ok.'

Cancer:
Sends a 200-word essay starting with what they had for breakfast.
Ends with 'How are you doing? Really? Are you sure?'

Capricorn:
Every message ends with a period. Never sends stickers.
You think they're mad. They're just at work.

Pisces:
Sends a song, an aesthetic photo, and a crying emoji.
You ask what's wrong. They say 'Nothing, just thinking about you.'

Scorpio:
If you leave them on read for more than 30 seconds, they know you're crafting a reply.
They won't rush you. They'll just silently watch every word you type.
en.editorNote: Send this to the friend who just spammed your DMs. Ask: which one are you?
variations: Gemini switches topics three times per text. You're still answering the first one — they've moved on to the fifth.
Taurus texts steadily, but if you want a real reply, wait until they've clocked out, eaten, and showered.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs at work — Virgo perfectionist, Leo demands recognition, Capricorn workaholic; relatable workplace humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座在公司是哪一種同事：

處女座：
你交報告之前他先幫你抓三個錯字。
他不是針對你，他是對所有人都這樣。包括老闆。

獅子座：
做了什麼一定要讓全公司知道。
沒人稱讚就會自己稱讚自己，「我覺得我這次表現真的滿好的。」

摩羯座：
下班時間到了還在開會。
別人在抱怨工時太長，他在思考要不要再加一個專案。

雙子座：
所有八卦都從他那裡聽到，但他每次都說「我不該講的」。
下一秒繼續講。

水瓶座：
開會的時候提一個沒人懂的點子，全場沉默。
三個月後發現他講的真的有道理，但已經太晚了。

巨蟹座：
公司任何人有事他都第一個關心。
離職的時候大家都很捨不得，因為再也沒有人會記得你的生日。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到公司群組，看誰先對號入座
variations: 天蠍座是辦公室裡最安靜的人，但他知道每個人在背後說什麼。
射手座的辦公桌上永遠有一張機票，他覺得任何問題都可以靠請假解決。

en.content:
What kind of coworker each zodiac sign is:

Virgo:
Catches three typos in your report before you submit it.
Not personal. They do this to everyone. Including the boss.

Leo:
Whatever they accomplished, the entire office must know.
If no one praises them, they praise themselves: 'Honestly, I think I crushed that.'

Capricorn:
Still in meetings after office hours.
While everyone complains about overwork, they're considering taking on one more project.

Gemini:
All office gossip flows through them, but they always say 'I really shouldn't be telling you this.'
Proceeds to tell you anyway.

Aquarius:
Drops a wildly original idea in a meeting. Room goes silent.
Three months later, everyone realizes they were right. Too late now.

Cancer:
First to check on anyone going through something.
When they leave the company, everyone misses them — because no one else remembers birthdays.
en.editorNote: Drop in the work group chat. See who self-identifies first.
variations: Scorpio is the quietest person in the office, but knows exactly what everyone says behind everyone's back.
Sagittarius keeps a flight ticket on their desk. They believe any problem can be solved by taking PTO.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs ranked introvert/extrovert — Leo most extroverted, Pisces/Virgo most introverted; party behavior humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座參加聚會的真實狀態：

獅子座：
一進場就確認自己是焦點，沒人看他就製造機會讓人看他。
離場前還要再問一次：「今天我是不是最美？」

雙魚座：
人多到第二十分鐘就開始想回家，假裝去廁所其實在回訊息給自己。
回到家鬆一口氣，然後失眠想剛剛有沒有講錯話。

處女座：
全場最清醒的那個。
別人在喝酒他在觀察誰跟誰互動，明天他就會在腦中重整整場聚會的人際圖譜。

金牛座：
找到角落、找到食物、找到一個不會被拉去玩遊戲的位置。
從頭到尾沒講超過十句話，但吃了三盤。

射手座：
聚會還沒結束他已經在計畫下一場。
「欸我們等下要不要去 KTV？」「不要回家啦！」

摩羯座：
看到群組訊息「今晚要來嗎」之後就開始找理由。
最後傳「不好意思我臨時有事」，事實上他只是想躺平。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次都被你拉去聚會的 I人朋友，他會懂
variations: 牡羊座的聚會狀態是「衝最前」，第一個到、最大聲、最後也是他喊「續攤」。
天秤座聚會的時候誰都會聊，回家後癱在床上不想再看到任何人。

en.content:
What each zodiac sign is actually doing at a party:

Leo:
Walks in, confirms they are the main character. If no one's looking, manufactures a reason for them to.
Before leaving, asks one more time: 'Was I the prettiest tonight?'

Pisces:
After 20 minutes wants to go home. Fakes a bathroom trip to text themselves.
Gets home, exhales in relief, then lies awake replaying every word they said.

Virgo:
The most sober person in the room.
While others drink, they observe who interacts with whom. Tomorrow they'll have a complete relational map in their head.

Taurus:
Finds the corner, finds the food, finds a spot far from any group game.
Speaks fewer than 10 sentences all night. Eats three plates.

Sagittarius:
The party isn't over and they're already planning the next one.
'Wait, are we doing karaoke after? Don't go home yet!'

Capricorn:
Sees the group chat invite. Immediately starts brainstorming excuses.
Sends 'Sorry, something came up.' Truth: just wants to lie on the couch.
en.editorNote: Send to your introvert friend who you keep dragging to parties. They get it.
variations: Aries shows up first, gets loudest, and is the one yelling 'one more bar' at 2am.
Libra chats with literally everyone at the party, then collapses at home not wanting to see another human for a week.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs apologizing — Aries quick, Taurus refuses, Scorpio holds grudge; relatable conflict humor

zh-tw.content:
各星座道歉的方式：

牡羊座：
吵完五分鐘後傳一句「對啦我錯了」。
不解釋、不分析，反正承認得很乾脆，下次還是會再犯。

金牛座：
他不會說對不起。
但他會默默買你愛吃的東西放冰箱。意思你自己懂。

雙子座：
會說「對不起」，但是用一個你看不出來是道歉的方式講出來。
比如：「好啦，那也許我那樣說真的有點……不過你那樣回也很怪啦。」
這算道歉嗎？算吧。

摩羯座：
承認錯誤的速度比承認感情還快。
他會說：「這是我的責任，下次不會了。」然後真的就不會了。

天蠍座：
表面上道歉，內心已經把這次紀錄下來。
下次你做錯什麼，他會把這筆帳一起算。

雙魚座：
還沒搞清楚誰對誰錯就先哭著道歉。
結束後在腦中重播一百次，覺得「其實我也沒錯啊」，但已經道歉了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近在冷戰的朋友，順便提醒他誰該先低頭
variations: 獅子座道歉的時候會強調「我真的不常道歉，你要珍惜這個瞬間」。
處女座道歉會附上一份問題分析報告，包括原因、改善方案和時間軸。

en.content:
How each zodiac sign apologizes:

Aries:
Five minutes after the fight: 'Okay fine, I was wrong.'
No explanation, no analysis. Owns it cleanly. Will absolutely do it again next time.

Taurus:
Will not say sorry.
Will silently put your favorite snack in the fridge. You know what it means.

Gemini:
Says sorry, but in a way you can't quite identify as an apology.
'Okay maybe what I said was a little... but the way you replied was kind of weird too.'
Does this count? Sure, let's call it that.

Capricorn:
Admits fault faster than they admit feelings.
Says 'That was my responsibility. Won't happen again.' And it genuinely won't.

Scorpio:
Apologizes on the surface. Internally files it away.
Next time you mess up, expect both incidents to come up at once.

Pisces:
Apologizes mid-cry before figuring out who was actually wrong.
Later replays it 100 times in their head, realizes 'wait, I wasn't wrong,' but the apology has already been delivered.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend in a cold war right now. Subtle hint about who should cave first.
variations: Leo's apology comes with a disclaimer: 'I don't apologize often, so cherish this moment.'
Virgo's apology arrives with a full root-cause analysis: causes, action plan, and prevention timeline.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn workaholic humor — taking calls on vacation, treating fun as a scheduled task

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座的人生哲學：
如果這件事不能放進行事曆，那它就不存在。

他們不是不會玩——只是覺得「玩」也應該設定一個合理的目標、預算和結束時間。
爬山途中接公司電話那個，八成是摩羯座。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個放假還在回訊息的摩羯朋友，他會冷冷回你「總要有人做啊」
variations: 摩羯座放假的方式：把週末規劃得比上班還滿，然後在週日晚上覺得自己很充實。
問摩羯座今天累不累，他不會回答——他只會打開行事曆告訴你下一個 deadline 是什麼時候。

en.content:
Capricorn life philosophy:
If it can't fit into the calendar, it doesn't exist.

They're not against fun — they just believe 'fun' should come with a clear goal, a budget, and an end time.
That person taking a work call halfway up a hiking trail? Probably a Capricorn.
en.editorNote: Send to your Capricorn friend who replies to Slack on vacation. They'll just say 'someone has to.'
variations: How a Capricorn does weekends: schedule them tighter than the work week, then feel productive by Sunday night.
Don't ask a Capricorn if they're tired. They'll just open their calendar and show you the next deadline.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius eccentric/detached humor — chill weirdos of the zodiac, unconventional thinking

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座不是冷漠——
他只是同時在思考宇宙的本質、晚餐要吃什麼，還有為什麼人類會發明領帶。

你覺得他不理你，其實他正在腦中跟另一個版本的你進行一場辯論，而且你還輸了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那個總是放空但其實腦袋很滿的水瓶朋友
variations: 水瓶座的「我在忙」翻譯：我正在思考一個完全跟你無關但我自己覺得很重要的問題。
想跟水瓶座聊天？先確認他現在的頻率有沒有在地球上。

en.content:
Aquarius isn't cold —
they're just simultaneously thinking about the nature of the universe, what to eat for dinner, and why humans invented neckties.

You think they're ignoring you. Actually they're mid-debate with a hypothetical version of you in their head — and you're losing.
en.editorNote: Send to your spaced-out Aquarius friend whose brain is actually running 14 tabs at once
variations: Aquarius 'I'm busy' translation: I'm thinking about something completely unrelated to you that I personally find very important.
Want to chat with an Aquarius? First check if their frequency is currently transmitting from this planet.

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs at work — Capricorn vs Aquarius office contrast humor

zh-tw.content:
辦公室裡的摩羯座 vs 水瓶座：

摩羯座：
會議前十分鐘到，準備好簡報、備案，連備案的備案都有。
別人說「這個我們再討論」，他翻譯：「OK，我來推進。」

水瓶座：
開會中突然提出一個沒人想過的問題，全場安靜三秒。
結果那個問題真的有道理，但沒人想處理，所以大家假裝沒聽到繼續開會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到公司群組需要勇氣，但摩羯跟水瓶看到都會默默點頭
variations: 摩羯座的 to-do list 是用來完成的，水瓶座的 to-do list 是用來證明他有想過要做。
公司加班最晚的是摩羯座，公司想到最多怪點子的是水瓶座，兩個一起合作會做出某種詭異但有效的東西。

en.content:
Capricorn vs Aquarius at the office:

Capricorn:
Arrives ten minutes before the meeting. Has the deck, the backup plan, and a backup for the backup.
When someone says 'we'll discuss later,' they hear: 'Cool, I'll drive it forward.'

Aquarius:
Mid-meeting, raises a question nobody thought of. Three seconds of silence.
The question is genuinely valid. Nobody wants to deal with it. Everyone pretends they didn't hear and moves on.
en.editorNote: Risky to send in a work group chat — but the Capricorn and Aquarius will both quietly nod
variations: A Capricorn's to-do list is for completing. An Aquarius's to-do list is proof they once thought about doing it.
The latest one to leave the office is a Capricorn. The one with the weirdest ideas is an Aquarius. Put them together and you get something strange but somehow it works.

items.sourceNote: Leo confidence humor — needing the spotlight, dramatic energy, making everything about themselves

zh-tw.content:
獅子座不是愛搶風頭——
只是當風頭剛好飄過來的時候，他覺得拒絕也是一種不禮貌。

你以為的單純抱怨，獅子座聽起來像是「我需要你誇我一下」。
沒誇？沒關係，他會自己誇自己給你看。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個拍照永遠站中間、走路自帶 BGM 的獅子朋友
variations: 獅子座傳訊息給你不是想聊天——他是想看你怎麼回他，順便確認自己今天還是很有魅力。
和獅子座吵架最有效的招式：不理他。他會自己腦補出一齣三幕劇，最後跑回來找你。

en.content:
Leo isn't hogging the spotlight —
it's just that when it happens to drift their way, refusing it would be rude.

What you think is a simple vent, a Leo hears as: 'Please compliment me right now.'
No compliment? Don't worry. They'll do it themselves, out loud, for your reference.
en.editorNote: Send to your Leo friend who's always center frame in group photos and walks like they have personal background music
variations: When a Leo texts you, it's not really about chatting. They want to see how you respond — and confirm they're still charming today.
Most effective tactic in a fight with a Leo: ignore them. They'll write a three-act play in their head and come back to you on their own.

items.sourceNote: Taurus stubbornness reframed as 'dedication with snacks' — comfort, naps, food humor

zh-tw.content:
金牛座不是固執，
是「帶著零食的堅持」。

你叫他改行程，他會先看一下手上那杯珍奶。
珍奶喝完之前，他不負責任何決定。
你以為他在發呆——他其實在認真比較哪一家鹽酥雞比較香。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個約吃飯永遠遲到、但一定會出現的金牛朋友
variations: 金牛座的午睡不是偷懶，是儀式。打擾他午睡的後果，比打擾他吃飯還嚴重。
金牛座的「我考慮一下」翻譯：我已經決定不要了，但我懶得跟你解釋。

en.content:
Taurus isn't stubborn —
they're just dedicated, with snacks.

Ask them to change plans and they'll glance at the boba in their hand first.
Until that boba is finished, they're not making any decisions.
You think they're spacing out — they're actually deeply comparing which fried chicken place smells better.
en.editorNote: Send to your Taurus friend who's always late for dinner but always shows up
variations: A Taurus nap isn't laziness — it's a ritual. Interrupting it is worse than interrupting their meal.
Taurus 'let me think about it' translates to: I already decided no, I just don't feel like explaining.

items.sourceNote: Gemini texting in three different moods — split personality / dual nature humor

zh-tw.content:
和雙子座傳訊息就像跟三個人聊天：

早上的他：「早安！今天我們要做大事！」
下午的他：已讀不回，疑似人間蒸發。
晚上的他：凌晨兩點傳一個哲學問題給你，附帶兩張迷因。

你問他怎麼了——他自己也不知道。他只是覺得三種心情都很有道理。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到雙子座群組必有共鳴，他們不會否認，只會回三種版本的「對啊」
variations: 雙子座可以同時站正反兩邊吵贏自己，這不是矛盾，這叫多元觀點。
雙子座答應你的事，要看是哪個雙子答應的。建議當場錄音存證。

en.content:
Texting a Gemini is like chatting with three different people:

Morning Gemini: 'Good morning! Today we're doing big things!'
Afternoon Gemini: Read at 2:14 PM. Possibly evaporated.
Midnight Gemini: Sends a philosophical question at 2 AM, plus two memes.

Ask what's going on — they don't know either. They just feel like all three moods made sense.
en.editorNote: Drop this in any Gemini group chat — they'll respond with three different versions of 'true'
variations: A Gemini can argue both sides and win against themselves. It's not contradiction, it's range.
A promise from a Gemini depends on which Gemini made it. Recommend getting it on the record.

items.sourceNote: Virgo overthinking, checklists, proofreading own thoughts — perfectionism humor

zh-tw.content:
處女座傳訊息前要校稿三次：

第一次：檢查錯字。
第二次：刪掉看起來太熱情的驚嘆號。
第三次：換掉那個句點，怕對方覺得他在生氣。

結果傳出去之後——他繼續盯著螢幕，懷疑那個 emoji 是不是太隨便了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個傳訊息比寫論文還慢的處女朋友
variations: 處女座約會清單第一條：對方有沒有按時回訊息。第二條到第三十七條：其他細節。
處女座說「我隨便」的時候，請不要真的隨便。他內心已經淘汰了七個選項。

en.content:
A Virgo proofreads a text three times before sending:

First pass: check for typos.
Second pass: delete the exclamation marks that look too eager.
Third pass: swap that period — what if they read it as angry?

Then they hit send — and immediately stare at the screen wondering if the emoji was too casual.
en.editorNote: Send to your Virgo friend who texts slower than they write essays
variations: A Virgo's dating checklist: Item 1 — do they reply on time. Items 2 through 37 — other details.
When a Virgo says 'I'm easy, you pick' — please don't actually pick randomly. They've already eliminated seven options in their head.

items.sourceNote: Pisces emotionally in another dimension — daydreaming, fantasy world, sensitive humor

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座聽你講話的時候，臉上看起來很專心。
其實他腦袋已經跑去演完一齣感情戲：
你失戀了→他陪你哭→你們一起去看海→海邊有彩虹→他想到自己上次失戀→眼眶開始紅。

你還在講第一句。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是莫名其妙突然感動到的雙魚朋友
variations: 雙魚座的「我沒事」有四種版本，第三種是真的有事，但他想看你猜不猜得出來。
和雙魚座聊天要小心——你只是隨口提到下雨，他可能已經寫完一首詩。

en.content:
A Pisces looks like they're listening intently to you.
Actually, their brain already finished a whole movie:
You get heartbroken → they cry with you → you go to the beach → there's a rainbow → they remember their own last heartbreak → eyes start watering.

You're still on your first sentence.
en.editorNote: Send to your Pisces friend who randomly tears up at the most innocent things
variations: A Pisces 'I'm fine' has four versions. Version three actually means something is wrong — they just want to see if you can tell.
Be careful chatting with a Pisces. Mention rain casually, and they've already finished writing a poem about it.

items.sourceNote: Gemini extrovert duality — chatty but secretly judging everyone

zh-tw.content:
雙子座最神奇的能力：
可以跟一個人聊兩小時、互加IG、約下次見面，
回家躺在床上想：「我剛剛到底為什麼要這樣？」

他們不是假，他們只是同時有八個自己在開會，每個都想發言。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個剛剛還在熱情聊天、現在又突然安靜的雙子，他懂
variations: 雙子座的兩個人格不是分裂——是輪班制，今天誰想出來就誰上。
和雙子座吵架的最大難題：你不知道你現在面對的是哪一個版本的他。

en.content:
A Gemini's most magical skill:
They'll chat with you for two hours, add you on IG, and plan to meet up again,
then go home, lie down, and wonder: 'Why did I just do all that?'

They're not fake. There are just eight versions of them in a board meeting, and every one wants speaking time.
en.editorNote: Send to your Gemini friend who was hyped five minutes ago and now needs absolute silence
variations: A Gemini's two personalities aren't split — they're on shift rotation. Whoever clocks in today gets the wheel.
The hardest part of arguing with a Gemini: you have no idea which version of them you're currently dealing with.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio brutally honest, intense — either silence or full truth

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座只有兩種狀態：
一、完全不講話。
二、把你心底最不想面對的事情，溫柔且精準地講出來。

中間沒有過渡。沒有暖場。沒有「我先問一下喔」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個常常一句話讓你愣住三秒的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座不是冷淡，他只是把要對你說的話，先在腦袋裡過了一百遍才決定講不講。
天蠍座的「我沒生氣」是真的沒生氣——他在記帳。

en.content:
A Scorpio has exactly two modes:
One — saying absolutely nothing.
Two — calmly and precisely naming the exact thing you've been avoiding for months.

No middle ground. No warm-up. No 'just curious, but…'
en.editorNote: Send to your Scorpio friend who can shut down a whole conversation with one sentence
variations: A Scorpio isn't cold. They've just rehearsed the sentence a hundred times before deciding whether to say it.
When a Scorpio says 'I'm not mad,' they really aren't. They're taking notes.

items.sourceNote: Leo extrovert spotlight — confidence, attention, performative energy

zh-tw.content:
獅子座走進一間房間的瞬間：
燈光自動打在他身上、背景音樂自動播放、所有人自動轉頭。

那不是巧合。那是他每天早上對鏡子練習出來的氣場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會還沒開始就已經在想等等要怎麼登場的獅子
variations: 獅子座不是愛現，他只是覺得這麼好看不被看見有點浪費。
和獅子座出去玩，照片裡的主角永遠是他——就算這張照片是他幫你拍的。

en.content:
The moment a Leo walks into a room:
The lights auto-focus on them, background music starts playing, every head turns.

Not a coincidence. They've been practicing that energy in front of the mirror every morning.
en.editorNote: Send to your Leo friend who's already mentally rehearsing their entrance before the party even starts
variations: A Leo isn't showing off. They just think it's a waste to look this good and not be seen.
Going out with a Leo means every photo's main character is them — even when they're the one taking the photo.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn introvert workaholic — silent, efficient, dismissive of small talk

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座參加聚會的內心OS：
「這場有意義嗎？能換到什麼？多久可以離開？」

他不是不合群，他只是在計算這兩小時的機會成本。算完通常會選擇回家工作。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是十點半就說「我先撤了」的摩羯，他正在路上
variations: 摩羯座的休息方式：把待辦清單再排一次，順便檢查有沒有更有效率的版本。
和摩羯座聊天，閒聊三句他就會問：「所以重點是？」

en.content:
What a Capricorn is actually thinking at a party:
'Is this useful? What do I get from this? How soon can I leave?'

They're not antisocial — they're calculating the opportunity cost of these two hours. Usually the math says: go home and work.
en.editorNote: Send to your Capricorn friend who always announces 'I'm heading out' at 10:30 sharp
variations: A Capricorn's idea of relaxing: re-sorting the to-do list and checking if there's a more efficient version.
Three sentences into small talk with a Capricorn and they'll ask: 'So what's the point?'

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius extrovert wanderlust — restless, spontaneous, hates being alone

zh-tw.content:
射手座週五晚上九點的訊息：
「欸我們明天去花蓮好不好？」

他不是真的問你意見——他已經在訂車了，他只是想讓你覺得是一起決定的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是把「說走就走」掛在嘴邊的射手朋友，他可能正在收行李
variations: 射手座的行程表只有兩種：一種叫「現在出發」，另一種叫「等等再說」。
射手座最受不了的事不是沒朋友，而是「沒事可做」。

en.content:
A Sagittarius's text at 9pm on a Friday:
'Hey, wanna drive up the coast tomorrow?'

They're not really asking your opinion — they've already booked the car. They just want you to feel like it was a joint decision.
en.editorNote: Send to your Sagittarius friend who's always talking about spontaneous trips. They're probably already packing.
variations: A Sagittarius schedule has exactly two settings: 'leaving now' and 'we'll figure it out later.'
A Sagittarius's worst nightmare isn't being alone — it's having nothing on the calendar.

items.sourceNote: Pisces introvert daydreamer — sensitive, lost in imagination, looks fragile but isn't

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座坐在那邊發呆五分鐘——
你以為他在放空，其實他剛剛在腦袋裡演完了一部三小時的電影，連片尾曲都聽完了。

而且主角是他喜歡的人，劇情通常很慘。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個常常一個人坐著就能玩一整天的雙魚朋友，他正在腦內小宇宙裡
variations: 雙魚座的「沒事」可能包含了：今天的對話回放、十年後的人生、剛剛那首歌的歌詞，跟一隻可能不存在的貓。
別小看雙魚座看起來脆弱的樣子，他在你看不到的地方已經自己撐過很多遍了。

en.content:
A Pisces stares into space for five minutes —
you think they're zoning out, but they've actually just played a full three-hour movie in their head, end credits included.

The lead is someone they like. The plot is usually devastating.
en.editorNote: Send to your Pisces friend who can sit alone all day and never feel bored — they're somewhere in their inner universe
variations: A Pisces saying 'I'm fine' may include: replays of today's conversations, a vision of life in ten years, the lyrics of that one song, and a cat that may or may not exist.
Don't underestimate a Pisces just because they look fragile. They've already weathered worse, alone, where you couldn't see.

items.sourceNote: Virgo overthinking introvert — silent observer, mental loop of hypotheticals

zh-tw.content:
處女座凌晨三點的腦袋：
「我五年前傳那則訊息結尾用句號是不是太冷淡？對方會不會記到現在？要不要補一個解釋？」

別擔心，對方早就忘了——只有處女座還在熬夜開檢討會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個半夜睡不著還在想白天小事的處女朋友，他現在很需要被理解
variations: 處女座不是冷漠，他只是已經在心裡把整段對話分析了八遍，還沒想到要怎麼回。
處女座的「沒關係」翻譯：我有關係，但我已經幫你把理由都想好了，所以算了。

en.content:
A Virgo's brain at 3am:
'Was the period at the end of that text I sent five years ago too cold? Are they still thinking about it? Should I send a follow-up to explain?'

Don't worry — the other person forgot ages ago. Only the Virgo is still up running the post-mortem.
en.editorNote: Send to your Virgo friend who can't sleep because of something tiny that happened today — they need to feel understood
variations: A Virgo isn't cold. They've already analyzed the conversation eight times in their head and still haven't decided how to reply.
A Virgo's 'it's fine' translates to: it's not fine, but I've already come up with all your excuses for you, so let's drop it.

items.sourceNote: Cancer moody homebody — emotional swings, loyal, prefers home over crowds

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座的一天：
早上覺得世界很美好，中午突然想哭，下午又沒事了，晚上看到一張舊照片，整個人重新崩潰一次。

他不是難搞——他只是同時在處理三十種情緒，而且每一種都認真。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個今天心情突然不好但又說不出原因的巨蟹朋友，他需要的不是建議，是抱抱
variations: 巨蟹座答應出門的條件只有一個：可以早點回家。
巨蟹座記仇不是壞，他只是每一段感情都收得很整齊，包括那些讓他受傷的。

en.content:
A day in the life of a Cancer:
Morning — the world is beautiful. Noon — suddenly wants to cry. Afternoon — fine again. Evening — sees an old photo, falls apart all over again.

They're not high-maintenance. They're just processing thirty emotions at once, and taking every single one of them seriously.
en.editorNote: Send to your Cancer friend who's randomly sad today and can't explain why. They don't need advice — they need a hug.
variations: A Cancer will agree to go out on one condition: that they can leave early and go home.
A Cancer doesn't hold grudges out of spite. They just file every relationship away neatly — including the ones that hurt them.

items.sourceNote: Leo extrovert — spotlight energy, confidence, main-character syndrome

zh-tw.content:
獅子座走進一個房間，不需要先打招呼——
他存在，就是一種打招呼的方式。

你問他為什麼這麼有自信？他會反問你：「為什麼不？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個走到哪裡都自帶聚光燈的獅子朋友，他會點開後說：「這就是事實」
variations: 獅子座不是愛當主角——他只是無法接受自己被寫成配角。
獅子座的低調，是其他人的高調。

en.content:
A Leo walks into a room and doesn't bother saying hi —
their existence is the hello.

Ask them why they're so confident, and they'll fire back: 'Why wouldn't I be?'
en.editorNote: Send to your Leo friend who walks around with their own spotlight. They'll read it and say: 'Accurate.'
variations: A Leo doesn't insist on being the main character — they just refuse to be cast as the sidekick.
A Leo's idea of being low-key is everyone else's idea of being extra.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius introvert — emotionally distant, observer, marches to own drum

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座的朋友列表分兩種：
一種是「我認識的人」，一種是「我有在想的人」——
兩種加起來不超過五個，而且通常都不知道自己被分在哪一邊。

他不是冷淡，他只是已經把社交配額用完了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個讀完訊息三天才回的水瓶朋友，他真的有在乎你，只是不會表現
variations: 水瓶座的「我在忙」翻譯：我在家，但我不想出門，也不想說話，但我有在想你。
水瓶座不是怪，是世界還沒跟上他的頻率。

en.content:
An Aquarius has two kinds of friends:
people they know, and people they think about —
combined total: maybe five. And neither group knows which list they're on.

They're not cold. They've just used up their social battery for the month.
en.editorNote: Send to your Aquarius friend who took three days to read your message. They care — they just don't show it the normal way.
variations: An Aquarius saying 'I'm busy' translates to: I'm home, I don't want to go out, I don't want to talk, but I am thinking about you.
An Aquarius isn't weird — the world just hasn't caught up to their frequency yet.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius extrovert — blunt honesty, freedom-loving, no filter

zh-tw.content:
射手座的人生規劃：
下個月——不知道。下週——不知道。明天——可能在不同的城市。

你問他為什麼這麼隨興？他會說：「都已經出生了，再規劃會不會太遲？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個三天前才說要去日本、今天人已經在機場的射手朋友
variations: 射手座的誠實不是壞，他只是覺得「想聽好聽話的話可以去問別人」。
射手座的承諾有效期限：到他想到下一件好玩的事為止。

en.content:
A Sagittarius life plan:
Next month — no idea. Next week — no idea. Tomorrow — possibly in a different city.

Ask them why they're so unstructured, and they'll say: 'I'm already born — isn't planning a bit late at this point?'
en.editorNote: Send to your Sag friend who mentioned Japan three days ago and is somehow already at the airport
variations: A Sagittarius isn't being rude when they're blunt. They just figure: 'If you wanted a nice lie, ask someone else.'
A Sagittarius's commitments expire the moment something more exciting comes along.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn introvert — work-focused, guarded, quietly judging

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座在聚會裡安靜不說話——
不是害羞，他正在心裡默默計算：這場活動的時間成本，跟在家完成今天待辦清單比起來，划不划算。

結論通常是：不划算。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個答應出來吃飯卻一直滑手機看訊息的摩羯朋友，他正在工作模式
variations: 摩羯座的「我有空」翻譯：我把這件事排進行程了，所以不要遲到。
摩羯座不是冷漠，他只是已經把感情也當成專案在管理。

en.content:
A Capricorn at a party, quietly not talking —
they're not shy. They're mentally calculating the time cost of this event versus finishing today's to-do list at home.

The conclusion is usually: not worth it.
en.editorNote: Send to your Capricorn friend who finally came to dinner but keeps checking their phone. They're still in work mode.
variations: A Capricorn saying 'I'm free' translates to: I've scheduled this into my calendar, so don't be late.
A Capricorn isn't emotionally distant — they just manage relationships like projects.

items.sourceNote: Libra indecisive people-pleaser — 'I'm not indecisive, I just like options' meme energy

zh-tw.content:
天秤座不是選擇困難，
他只是同時看到了A的好、B的好、C的好，還有A+B+C一起選的可能性。

你問他「到底要哪個」，他會回你：「都好，你決定」——然後你決定之後，他再默默告訴你他其實想要另一個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次問他想吃什麼都說「都可以」的天秤朋友，他看完會說「對，但我真的都可以」
variations: 天秤座的「隨便」不是隨便，是「請你猜中我心裡那個我說不出口的選項」。
天秤座吵架的方式：先同意你說的所有事，然後在心裡反駁三十遍。

en.content:
A Libra isn't indecisive —
they just see the good in A, the good in B, the good in C, and the possibility of picking A+B+C all at once.

Ask them 'which one?' and they'll say 'whatever you want.' Then, after you decide, they'll quietly mention they were actually leaning toward the other one.
en.editorNote: Send to your Libra friend who answers 'I don't mind' every time you ask what they want to eat. They'll read it and say: 'Yeah, but I really don't mind.'
variations: A Libra's 'whatever' isn't whatever — it's 'please guess the option I can't bring myself to say out loud.'
How a Libra argues: agree with everything you said, then privately rebut it thirty times in their head.

items.sourceNote: Aries blunt honesty extrovert — speaks first, filters never

zh-tw.content:
牡羊座的嘴跟腦袋之間沒有過濾器——
話已經說出口三秒了，他才開始思考「啊，這句話是不是不該說？」

但通常想完之後的結論是：「算了，反正都說了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是第一個把真話說出來、講完才後悔的牡羊朋友，他會笑著承認
variations: 牡羊座不是白目，他只是覺得「在心裡想跟說出來」這兩個動作中間，那段距離浪費了人生。
問牡羊「你說真的還是說假的」是浪費時間——他連假的都來不及編。

en.content:
There's no filter between an Aries's brain and their mouth —
the words are already three seconds out before they think 'wait, should I have said that?'

The usual conclusion: 'Eh, too late now.'
en.editorNote: Send to your Aries friend who blurts out the truth first and regrets it second. They'll laugh and own it.
variations: An Aries isn't rude. They just feel the gap between 'thinking it' and 'saying it' is a waste of life.
Asking an Aries 'are you serious or joking?' is pointless — they don't even have time to come up with a lie.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio mysterious introvert — observes everything, forgets nothing, low-key intense

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座在角落安靜地觀察你三個小時——
他不是無聊，他正在把你的微表情、語氣、停頓、跟那杯飲料喝了幾口，全部存進腦內資料庫。

下次見面，他會用一句話讓你發現：原來他什麼都記得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個讀訊息很少但記住你所有事的天蠍朋友，他不是冷淡，他只是專心
variations: 天蠍座的「沒事」分兩種：一種是真的沒事，一種是他已經把這件事歸檔到「以後再說」資料夾。
別以為天蠍座原諒你了，他只是覺得現在計較不划算。

en.content:
A Scorpio sits quietly in the corner watching you for three hours —
they're not bored. They're filing your micro-expressions, tone, pauses, and how many sips you've taken of that drink into a mental database.

Next time you meet, one sentence from them will reveal: they remembered everything.
en.editorNote: Send to your Scorpio friend who rarely texts back but somehow remembers every detail about you. Not cold — just focused.
variations: A Scorpio's 'it's nothing' comes in two flavors: actually nothing, or already filed under 'we'll revisit this later.'
Don't assume a Scorpio has forgiven you. They've just decided it's not worth bringing up right now.

items.sourceNote: Pisces escapist daydreamer introvert — emotional sponge, lives half in fantasy

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座的逃避不是不負責任——
他只是先躲進腦袋裡的小世界，把現實的問題放在門外排隊。

等他出來的時候，問題還在原地，但至少他充好電了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次心情低落就會「人間蒸發」幾天的雙魚朋友，他不是不理你，他在自我修復
variations: 雙魚座聽你講煩惱，最後比你還難過——他不是在搶戲，他是真的把你的情緒也接收了。
雙魚座的「我沒事」翻譯：我有事，但我懶得解釋，講完你也救不了我，那就算了。

en.content:
A Pisces escaping isn't irresponsibility —
they just retreat into the little world in their head and leave real-life problems queued at the door.

When they come back out, the problems are still there. But at least they've recharged.
en.editorNote: Send to your Pisces friend who disappears for a few days every time they're down. They're not ignoring you — they're repairing themselves.
variations: A Pisces listening to your problems ends up sadder than you — not stealing the moment, just genuinely absorbing your emotions too.
A Pisces saying 'I'm fine' translates to: I'm not, but explaining it won't help, and you can't fix it anyway, so let's drop it.

items.sourceNote: Cancer soft-hearted homebody extrovert side — caring, nurturing, but on their terms

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座約你出來，通常不是因為他想出門——
是因為他想看到你好好的，順便確認你今天有沒有吃飯。

聚會結束後他會說：「我先回家了喔」——他從一開始就沒打算待太久，但他願意為你出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個三不五時就問你「最近還好嗎」的巨蟹朋友，他真的記得你說過的每件小事
variations: 巨蟹座的愛是煮一鍋湯放在冰箱、傳一則「記得吃飯」、然後在你忘記時假裝沒生氣。
巨蟹座不是黏人，他只是把在乎的人放在很重要的位置，所以你不見了他會慌。

en.content:
A Cancer inviting you out isn't because they want to go out —
it's because they want to see you doing okay, and double-check whether you've eaten today.

At the end of the night they'll say 'I'm heading home now' — they were never planning to stay long. But they showed up for you.
en.editorNote: Send to your Cancer friend who keeps randomly checking in with 'you doing okay?' They genuinely remember every small thing you've told them.
variations: A Cancer's love language: making a pot of soup for the fridge, texting 'remember to eat,' and pretending not to be hurt when you forget.
A Cancer isn't clingy. They've just placed the people they love in an important slot — so when you go missing, they panic.

items.sourceNote: Virgo sarcasm — pro-solitude not anti-social, art of dry observation

zh-tw.content:
處女座不是反社會——
是「親獨處派」。

他們沒有討厭你，只是覺得跟你聊天的這30分鐘，可以拿來整理抽屜、寫待辦清單、再順便重新規劃人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是「我先回家了」的處女朋友，他會點頭表示這就是事實
variations: 處女座的毒舌不是刻意的，是長期觀察人類後自然產生的副作用。
處女座說「我沒事」的時候，通常代表他已經在心裡修正了你三個錯字。

en.content:
A Virgo isn't anti-social —
they're pro-solitude.

It's not that they don't like you. It's that the 30 minutes spent chatting could've been used to organize a drawer, write a to-do list, and rethink their entire life plan.
en.editorNote: Send to your Virgo friend who always 'heads home early.' They'll just nod — it's accurate.
variations: A Virgo's sarcasm isn't intentional. It's a natural side effect of observing humans for too long.
When a Virgo says 'I'm fine,' it usually means they've already mentally corrected three of your typos.

items.sourceNote: Introverted Leo — quietly confident, performs only when they choose to, recharges alone

zh-tw.content:
I人的獅子座最危險——
他不需要全場掌聲，他自己就是那個掌聲。

你以為他在角落安靜，其實他只是覺得今天的舞台不值得他上場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個看起來低調、但你知道他內心戲超強的獅子朋友
variations: I型獅子座的自信不靠別人給——他從小就自己給自己頒獎。
獅子座可以安靜，但安靜的獅子座還是獅子座，王不會因為閉嘴就變成貓。

en.content:
An introverted Leo is the most dangerous kind —
they don't need a standing ovation. They are the standing ovation.

You think they're quiet in the corner? No — they just decided today's stage wasn't worth their entrance.
en.editorNote: Send to your low-key Leo friend who looks chill but has an entire inner monologue running in 4K.
variations: An introverted Leo's confidence isn't given by others — they've been handing themselves awards since childhood.
A Leo can be quiet. But a quiet Leo is still a Leo. The king doesn't become a cat just by shutting up.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius commitment-phobic free spirit — wanderlust, hates settling down, optimistic chaos

zh-tw.content:
射手座的人生規劃：
短期目標——明天要幹嘛還沒想。
中期目標——下個月飛去哪裡。
長期目標——不想討論這個。

他們不是不負責任，他們只是把「自由」放在比「計畫」更前面的位置。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那個老是說「我們改天再約啦」的射手朋友——「改天」對他來說是個哲學概念
variations: 射手座說「我下週有空」，請翻譯成：「我下週可能還在這個城市，也可能不在。」
射手座最害怕的兩個字不是分手，是「定下來」。

en.content:
A Sagittarius life plan:
Short-term — haven't decided about tomorrow yet.
Mid-term — which country next month.
Long-term — don't want to talk about this.

They're not irresponsible. They just rank 'freedom' higher than 'planning' on the priority list.
en.editorNote: Send to your Sagittarius friend who keeps saying 'let's hang out sometime' — 'sometime' is basically a philosophical concept to them.
variations: When a Sagittarius says 'I'm free next week,' translate it as: 'I might still be in this city next week. Or I might not.'
A Sagittarius's two scariest words aren't 'break up' — they're 'settle down.'

items.sourceNote: Zodiac signs giving advice — Scorpio brutally honest, Libra dodges, Aries says 'just do it', Taurus says 'just don't'

zh-tw.content:
找12星座給建議：
牡羊——「衝啊，不要想。」
金牛——「不要動，等等再說。」
天蠍——「你不會喜歡我說的真話。」
天秤——「我覺得都可以耶你決定。」
摩羯——「先把這件事列進行事曆。」
雙魚——「我感覺到你的痛，但我也忘記你問什麼了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合丟到朋友群組然後看大家對號入座，最準的那個通常會跳出來罵人
variations: 12星座面對你哭：牡羊「然後呢？」、巨蟹「我陪你」、天蠍「誰弄你的」、雙子「我講個笑話」、處女「你哭完先擦眼淚這裡濕了」。
星座的安慰方式：水象抱抱、火象開戰、土象遞紙巾、風象開始分析你的MBTI。

en.content:
Asking each zodiac sign for advice:
Aries — 'Just go. Don't think.'
Taurus — 'Don't move. Wait it out.'
Scorpio — 'You won't like the truth.'
Libra — 'Honestly either works, you decide.'
Capricorn — 'Add it to the calendar first.'
Pisces — 'I feel your pain, but I also forgot the question.'
en.editorNote: Drop in a group chat and watch everyone identify themselves. The one that's most accurate usually starts arguing first.
variations: How each sign reacts to you crying: Aries — 'And then?' Cancer — 'I'm right here.' Scorpio — 'Who did this.' Gemini — 'Let me tell a joke.' Virgo — 'Wipe your face first, you're getting it wet.'
Comforting styles by element: Water hugs you, Fire declares war, Earth hands you a tissue, Air starts analyzing your MBTI.

items.sourceNote: Libra in love — chameleon energy, becomes their partner, loses sense of self in relationships

zh-tw.content:
天秤座戀愛三階段：
第一階段：「我們好像耶。」
第二階段：「我們真的很像。」
第三階段：「我是誰？我為什麼在喝美式咖啡？我不是只喝拿鐵嗎？」

天秤座不是沒有個性，他只是把個性借給對方了，借完忘記拿回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那個一交往就整個人變樣的天秤朋友——髮型、口味、追蹤的帳號全部跟著換
variations: 天秤座的戀愛守則：先了解對方喜歡什麼，再把自己變成那個樣子。優雅、無痛、零衝突。
怎麼判斷天秤座最近在跟誰交往？看他最近穿什麼、聽什麼、追蹤什麼就知道了。

en.content:
The three stages of a Libra in love:
Stage 1: 'We're so similar.'
Stage 2: 'We're literally the same person.'
Stage 3: 'Who am I? Why am I drinking black coffee? I only drink lattes.'

A Libra isn't personality-less. They just lent it to their partner and forgot to ask for it back.
en.editorNote: Send to your Libra friend who completely transforms the moment they start dating — new hair, new taste in music, new follow list
variations: Libra dating strategy: study what their partner likes, then quietly become that. Elegant, painless, zero conflict.
Want to know who a Libra is dating? Just look at what they're wearing, listening to, and following lately.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius in love — emotionally distant but secretly devoted, refuses to admit feelings

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座說「我沒有很在意你」的時候，請翻譯成：
「我已經把你的生日、過敏食物、最常用的詞、上次哭的原因全部記下來了，但我絕對不會讓你知道這件事。」

他們不是冷淡——只是把「在乎」這件事當作機密文件在保管。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個明明很在意你卻死不承認的水瓶朋友，他看完會說「你想太多」然後默默已讀截圖
variations: 水瓶座的愛是後知後覺型——你要等到他突然記得你五年前隨口說的話，才會發現他其實一直都在。
和水瓶座交往最痛苦的是：他真的很愛你，但他不會說，也不準你問，更不準你猜對。

en.content:
When an Aquarius says 'I don't really care that much,' please translate it as:
'I have memorized your birthday, your food allergies, your most-used phrases, and the reason you cried last month. But I will absolutely never let you know this.'

They're not cold. They just file 'caring' under classified information.
en.editorNote: Send to your Aquarius friend who clearly cares but refuses to admit it. They'll respond 'you're overthinking' and then quietly screenshot the message.
variations: Aquarius love is the delayed-realization kind — you only notice it when they randomly remember something you said five years ago.
The hardest part of dating an Aquarius: they genuinely love you, but they won't say it, won't let you ask, and definitely won't let you guess correctly.

items.sourceNote: Cancer vs Capricorn opposites — emotional homebody vs cold workaholic, surprisingly compatible duo

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座跟摩羯座為什麼會合得來？

巨蟹：「我準備了你愛吃的，記得吃。」
摩羯：「謝謝，我吃完繼續工作。」
巨蟹：「你不要太累。」
摩羯：「嗯。」

一個負責照顧情緒，一個負責假裝自己不需要被照顧。剛剛好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那種「一個熱情一個冷淡但莫名很搭」的朋友組合，兩個人都會默默承認
variations: 巨蟹座是那種會在你加班到三點端熱湯給你的人，摩羯座是那個喝完默默把碗洗了繼續工作的人。
土象配水象的浪漫：「我不會說我愛你，但你冰箱永遠是滿的。」

en.content:
Why do Cancer and Capricorn actually work?

Cancer: 'I made your favorite. Don't forget to eat.'
Capricorn: 'Thanks. I'll eat and get back to work.'
Cancer: 'Don't push yourself too hard.'
Capricorn: 'Mm.'

One handles the emotions, the other pretends they don't need any handling. Perfectly balanced.
en.editorNote: Perfect for that one warm/cold duo in your friend group that somehow just works — both will quietly admit it's accurate
variations: A Cancer is the one bringing you hot soup at 3am while you're working. A Capricorn is the one who drinks it, washes the bowl, and goes right back to work.
Earth-meets-water romance: 'I won't say I love you, but your fridge will never be empty.'

items.sourceNote: Pisces forced to do adult/practical tasks — fantasy world vs reality clash, taxes/forms/scheduling humor

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座面對現實生活的標準流程：

步驟一：打開要處理的事情。
步驟二：看一眼。
步驟三：感覺有點累。
步驟四：先躺一下。
步驟五：醒來發現已經三天過去了。

他們不是在拖延，他們只是在「為這件事醞釀情緒」，醞釀完通常就過期了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個總是在 deadline 前一晚才開始崩潰的雙魚朋友，他會說「你是不是裝了監視器」
variations: 雙魚座的「我等等就做」可以從早上九點延伸到隔週五，物理學上是合理的。
雙魚座不是逃避責任，他只是覺得這個世界太用力了，需要常常去另一個維度休息。

en.content:
A Pisces handling real-life tasks, step by step:

Step 1: Open the thing.
Step 2: Look at it.
Step 3: Feel slightly tired.
Step 4: Lie down for a sec.
Step 5: Wake up and three days have passed.

They're not procrastinating. They're just 'building emotional capacity for the task.' Usually it expires before they get there.
en.editorNote: Send to your Pisces friend who always panics the night before a deadline. They'll say 'are you spying on me?'
variations: A Pisces saying 'I'll do it in a sec' can stretch from 9am Monday to next Friday. It's physically valid.
A Pisces isn't avoiding responsibility. They just find this world a bit too loud and need to escape to another dimension regularly.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio loyalty / ride-or-die — fiercely protective of inner circle, terrifying to outsiders, soft inside

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座的友情很簡單：
你是他的人——他願意為你打整場仗。
你不是他的人——他連你叫什麼可能都記不住。

他們不是冷漠，他們只是把「在乎」這件事限量發行。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你那個被天蠍座當「自己人」的朋友——他們大概不知道自己有多被保護
variations: 天蠍座對外人冷得像冰塊，對自己人熱到可以煮火鍋——溫差就是這麼大，沒有中間值。
惹到天蠍座本人沒事，惹到天蠍座在乎的人——你才知道什麼叫做「你以後再也不會出現在他的世界裡」。

en.content:
Scorpio friendship rules are simple:
If you're one of theirs — they'll fight an entire war for you.
If you're not — they probably can't remember your name.

They're not cold. They just release 'caring' as a limited edition.
en.editorNote: Send to your friend who's been adopted into a Scorpio's inner circle — they probably have no idea how protected they actually are
variations: A Scorpio is ice-cold to outsiders and hot enough to boil water for their inner circle. The temperature gap is real, with zero middle ground.
Mess with a Scorpio? Fine. Mess with someone a Scorpio loves? That's when you learn what 'you will never exist in their world again' actually means.

items.sourceNote: Gemini dual-mode personality — partying hard one week, ghosting everyone the next, switching between E and I within 24 hours

zh-tw.content:
雙子座的星期一：「我要去認識三百個新朋友！」
雙子座的星期二：「請不要跟我說話，連已讀都不要。」

他們不是情緒不穩定——他們只是一個人活著兩種人生，剛好都讓你看到了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個上週還約你每天出去、這週直接從地球消失的雙子朋友——他自己也不知道為什麼
variations: 雙子座不是 E 人也不是 I 人，他們是「看今天電池剩多少」人。
問雙子座「你還好嗎」其實沒意義，因為十分鐘後的他已經不是現在這個他了。

en.content:
Gemini on Monday: 'I want to meet 300 new people this week!'
Gemini on Tuesday: 'Please don't talk to me. Don't even open my message.'

They're not unstable — they're just living two lives in one body, and you happen to see both.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini friend who wanted hangouts every day last week and vanished off the planet this week — they don't know why either
variations: Gemini isn't an extrovert or introvert. They're a 'check the battery level today' kind of person.
Asking a Gemini 'are you okay' is pointless — the Gemini ten minutes from now isn't the same one you're asking.

items.sourceNote: Virgo perfectionism — silently fixing everyone else's mistakes, mental spreadsheet of who did what wrong, never says it out loud

zh-tw.content:
處女座從來不會說「你做錯了」。
他們只會默默把你做錯的部分重做一遍，然後在心裡幫你建檔。

那個檔案叫「不是不能合作，只是不會主動找他」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你身邊那個總是把報告改到 3am、卻不會跟你說一聲的處女座同事——他真的有在數
variations: 處女座的「沒關係」是有等級的：第一級是真的沒關係，第三級是你以後再也不會被加進專案。
處女座不挑剔，他們只是腦袋裡有一個 Excel 在即時更新所有人的失誤率。

en.content:
A Virgo will never say 'you did it wrong.'
They'll just silently redo your part and quietly file it away in their head.

The file is called: 'Capable of working with them, but I will never volunteer.'
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo coworker who's been rewriting your reports until 3am without ever mentioning it — they're keeping score
variations: A Virgo's 'it's fine' has levels. Level 1: actually fine. Level 3: you'll never be added to a project again.
Virgos aren't picky. They just have a live Excel sheet in their head tracking everyone's error rate.

items.sourceNote: Leo attention paradox — pretends not to need attention, withers without it, performs even when alone

zh-tw.content:
獅子座：「我不需要別人關注我啦。」
（同時偷偷確認自己 IG 限動的觀看數）

他們不是愛現——他們只是覺得，如果沒人看見，那這件事好像就沒有真的發生過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「我不在乎別人怎麼想」但會把同一張自拍重發三次的獅子朋友——他會笑，然後再發一次
variations: 獅子座一個人在家也會表演，因為他覺得宇宙在看。
獅子座最害怕的不是被討厭，是被忽略——被討厭至少還有人在乎你的存在。

en.content:
Leo: 'I don't need people's attention.'
(Quietly checks who viewed their IG story for the seventh time.)

They're not attention-seeking — they just feel like if no one saw it, it didn't really happen.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who claims not to care what people think but reposted the same selfie three times — they'll laugh and post it again
variations: A Leo home alone still puts on a performance because they believe the universe is watching.
A Leo's biggest fear isn't being hated. It's being ignored. At least 'hated' means you exist to someone.

items.sourceNote: Taurus stubbornness about food — will not be swayed on restaurant choice, comfort eating as identity

zh-tw.content:
問金牛座要吃什麼，他會說「都可以」。
你提了五間，他全部說不要。
最後他帶你去他每週都會去的那間。

他不是難搞——他只是早就知道答案，只是希望你主動發現。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個永遠約你去同一間咖啡店的金牛朋友，他會說「但那間真的就是最好啊」
variations: 金牛座的「我們去新地方試試」翻譯過來是「我們去新地方然後你發現還是我那間最好」。
金牛座可以為了一頓飯走三公里，但不會為了嘗鮮多走三公尺。

en.content:
Ask a Taurus where to eat. They'll say 'anywhere is fine.'
You suggest five places. They reject all five.
They end up taking you to the one place they go to every week.

They're not difficult — they just already knew the answer and wanted you to discover it on your own.
en.editorNote: Send to the Taurus friend who only ever wants to go to the same cafe. They'll say 'but that place really is the best.'
variations: When a Taurus says 'let's try somewhere new,' what they mean is 'let's go somewhere new so you can realize my regular spot is still better.'
A Taurus will walk three kilometers for a meal they love, but not three meters for something unfamiliar.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn work obsession — uses productivity as identity, struggles to rest, weekend equals catching up on more work

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座的「我要休息一下」實際內容：

— 把待辦清單重新排序
— 整理桌面
— 順便回三封 email
— 思考下一季的 KPI
— 罪惡感地躺了七分鐘
— 起來繼續做事

他們不是不會休息，他們只是覺得休息本身也應該有產出。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個請特休結果還是在 Slack 上回訊息的摩羯朋友，他會說「我只是順手看一下」
variations: 摩羯座的快樂不是來自做完事情，而是來自「下一件事是什麼」。
你問摩羯座「你不累嗎」，他會說「累啊，但累完才有資格休息」——然後永遠也不夠資格。

en.content:
What a Capricorn means by 'I'm taking a break':

— Reorganize the to-do list
— Clean the desk
— Reply to three emails real quick
— Think about next quarter's KPIs
— Lie down for seven guilt-filled minutes
— Get back up and keep going

They know how to rest. They just feel like rest should also produce something.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn friend who's 'on vacation' but still replying on Slack. They'll say 'I was just checking real quick.'
variations: A Capricorn's joy doesn't come from finishing a task. It comes from knowing what the next one is.
Ask a Capricorn 'aren't you tired?' and they'll say 'yes, but I have to earn the right to rest' — and they never feel like they've earned it.

items.sourceNote: Virgo perfectionism — over-organizes everything, secretly judging your messy life, can't enjoy anything until the dishes are done

zh-tw.content:
處女座不是潔癖——
他們只是在你家看到水槽裡那個杯子之後，整個晚上腦袋裡都只有那個杯子。

你以為他在聽你說話，其實他在心裡幫你把抽屜重新分類。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個來你家會默默幫你擺正遙控器的處女朋友，他會說「我哪有，只是看起來比較舒服而已」
variations: 處女座的「沒關係啦」翻譯：我有關係，我很有關係，但我不想當壞人。
問處女座「你還好嗎？」他會說「還好」——其實他正在腦袋裡列出十七件需要重做的事情。

en.content:
A Virgo isn't a clean freak —
they just saw that one cup in your sink three hours ago and now it's all they can think about.

You think they're listening to your story. They're mentally reorganizing your drawer.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo friend who quietly straightens your remote when they visit. They'll say 'I didn't, it just looks better that way.'
variations: When a Virgo says 'it's fine,' it translates to: 'it is not fine, but I'm not the villain here.'
Ask a Virgo 'are you okay?' and they'll say 'yeah' — while mentally listing seventeen things that need to be redone.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius bluntness — says brutally honest things without filter, calls it 'just being real', allergic to sugarcoating

zh-tw.content:
射手座不是白目——
他只是覺得，講真話應該是基本配備，不是奢侈品。

你受傷的不是他講的內容，是他講完之後笑笑說「我幫你而已啊」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個會直接說「你今天看起來很累」的射手朋友，他會說「我以為這叫關心」
variations: 射手座的安慰公式：先講事實 → 再講解決辦法 → 最後問你「所以你在難過什麼？」
你問射手座「我這樣穿好看嗎？」他會說「還行吧但你上次那件比較好」——他真的覺得自己很溫柔了。

en.content:
A Sagittarius isn't being rude —
they just think honesty should be the standard, not the upgrade.

What hurt wasn't what they said. It was the smile afterward and the 'I'm just trying to help.'
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius friend who tells you 'you look tired today' first thing in the morning. They'll say 'I thought that counted as caring.'
variations: A Sagittarius comforts you in three steps: state the facts, offer a solution, then ask 'so what are you actually upset about?'
Ask a Sagittarius 'does this outfit look good?' and they'll say 'it's fine, but the last one was better.' They genuinely think they're being gentle.

items.sourceNote: Pisces emotional overload — cries at commercials, absorbs everyone's feelings, lives half in fantasy and half in too-much-reality

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座可以一邊看廣告哭、一邊吃洋芋片、一邊規劃下個月去哪個國家定居。

他不是情緒化——他只是同時活在三個世界，剛好那個會哭的世界今天比較活躍。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個跟你聊天聊一聊突然安靜五分鐘的雙魚朋友，他會說「我剛剛在想一件三年前的事」
variations: 雙魚座的腦袋永遠開著二十個分頁，其中十九個是「如果當初」。
問雙魚座「你在想什麼？」如果他說「沒什麼」，意思是「太多了，我不知道從哪一個開始講」。

en.content:
A Pisces can cry at a commercial, eat chips, and plan which country to move to next month — all at the same time.

They're not emotional. They just live in three worlds at once, and today the one with the crying happens to be in charge.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces friend who goes silent mid-conversation for five minutes. They'll say 'I was just thinking about something that happened three years ago.'
variations: A Pisces brain runs twenty tabs at all times — nineteen of them are titled 'what if.'
Ask a Pisces 'what are you thinking?' If they say 'nothing,' it means 'too much, and I don't know where to start.'

items.sourceNote: Leo main character energy — performs even when nobody is watching, treats every room as their stage, secretly insecure but never shows it

zh-tw.content:
獅子座走進任何一個場合，都自動切換成主角模式——
不是因為他想被看到，而是因為他覺得：如果不是他，那是誰？

他不是愛現，他只是很認真地把每一天當電影在演。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個拍照永遠站正中間還很自然的獅子朋友，他會說「不然你要我站邊邊嗎？那不是浪費構圖？」
variations: 獅子座的能量公式：一分自信 × 九分演技 × 全場視線 = 剛剛好。
你以為獅子座很有自信，其實他只是練習過很多次「看起來很有自信」的表情。

en.content:
A Leo walks into any room and immediately switches to main-character mode —
not because they want attention, but because in their head the logic is simple: if not them, then who?

They're not showing off. They just take 'living your life like a movie' very, very seriously.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who always ends up dead center in every group photo. They'll say 'what, you want me on the side? That's bad composition.'
variations: A Leo's energy formula: one part confidence, nine parts performance, full room attention — perfectly balanced.
You think a Leo is confident. Really, they've just rehearsed the 'looking confident' face a few hundred times.

items.sourceNote: Cancer overthinker — Moon-ruled emotional spiral, replays a conversation from three days ago, asks 'are you mad at me?' when you said one short sentence

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座的腦袋是一台24小時不關機的回憶播放器——
你三天前回他一句「嗯」，他到現在還在分析那個「嗯」是禮貌、敷衍、還是有事。

他不是太敏感，他只是把每一句話都重看了五遍。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個會突然傳「你是不是在生我的氣」的巨蟹朋友，他會說「不然你解釋一下那個句點」
variations: 巨蟹座的安全感是用「對方有沒有秒讀」、「語氣有沒有變」、「最後一個字是不是句點」三件事拼起來的。
你跟巨蟹說「沒事」，他聽到的是「有事但我不想講」——而且他會記到下禮拜。

en.content:
A Cancer's brain is a 24/7 replay machine —
you said 'ok' to them three days ago, and they're still analyzing whether it was polite, dismissive, or passive-aggressive.

They're not too sensitive. They've just reread every text you sent at least five times.
en.editorNote: Send to the Cancer friend who randomly texts 'are you mad at me?' out of nowhere. They'll say 'then explain the period at the end of your last message.'
variations: A Cancer's sense of safety is built from three things: how fast you replied, whether your tone changed, and whether your last sentence ended in a period.
