Tell a Cancer 'it's nothing.' What they hear is 'something is wrong but I don't want to talk about it' — and they'll still be thinking about it next week.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius situationally unavailable — will talk for hours about aliens or philosophy but ghosts the second feelings come up, friendly with everyone yet truly close to nobody

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座可以跟你聊四個小時外星人、平行宇宙、為什麼蟑螂打不死——
但你問他「你最近還好嗎？」他會說「嗯，蠻好的」，然後切回外星人。

他不是冷漠，他只是覺得：情緒這種東西，自己處理就好，不需要打擾別人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個你認識五年但完全不知道他家在哪的水瓶朋友，他會說「我以為你不需要知道」
variations: 水瓶座的友誼分布：認識的人很多、好朋友幾個、真正聊心事的——他自己也在找。
問水瓶座「你最近談戀愛嗎？」他會說「沒空」——其實已經談三個月了，只是沒打算公告。

en.content:
An Aquarius can talk to you for four hours about aliens, parallel universes, and why cockroaches refuse to die —
but ask them 'how are you really doing?' and they'll say 'yeah, fine,' then pivot back to aliens.

They're not cold. They just think feelings are a personal project, not a group activity.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius friend you've known for five years and still don't know where they live. They'll say 'I didn't think you needed to know.'
variations: An Aquarius's social map: lots of acquaintances, a few close friends, and the 'people I actually talk to' tier — still under construction.
Ask an Aquarius 'are you dating anyone?' They'll say 'no time.' They've been dating someone for three months. They just didn't see the point of announcing it.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio grudge-keeping — remembers every slight from 2009, smiles politely while mentally filing it away, doesn't get mad gets receipts

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座不會跟你吵架——
他會微笑、點頭、跟你說「沒關係」，然後把這件事存進一個你永遠看不到的資料夾，標題寫「2017年6月，這個人說過的話」。

他不是記仇，他只是記性很好，剛好他覺得「忘記」是一種放過自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個從來不發脾氣但你總覺得有點怕的天蠍朋友，他會說「我幹嘛生氣，我又沒事」
variations: 天蠍座的原諒分兩種：表面上「沒事啦」，跟內心的「我記得，只是先放著」。
你以為天蠍座忘了那件事，其實他只是還沒決定要怎麼用。

en.content:
A Scorpio won't fight with you —
they'll smile, nod, say 'it's fine,' and quietly file the moment into a folder you'll never see, labeled 'June 2017, things this person said.'

They don't hold grudges. They just have an excellent memory, and they happen to think 'letting it go' is something you do for yourself.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio friend who never raises their voice but somehow still makes everyone slightly nervous. They'll say 'why would I be mad? I'm not mad.'
variations: A Scorpio's forgiveness comes in two flavors: the public 'no worries,' and the private 'I remember, I just haven't decided what to do about it yet.'
You think a Scorpio forgot about that thing you did. They didn't. They just haven't decided how to use it yet.

items.sourceNote: Libra indecision paralysis — can't pick a restaurant for forty minutes, asks 'what do YOU want' to dodge responsibility, agonizes over which font to use in a casual email

zh-tw.content:
天秤座最痛苦的問題不是「你愛不愛我」——
是「中午要吃什麼」。

他不是不會做決定，他只是看到任何一個選項，腦中就自動跑出另外三個更好的可能。然後就，卡住了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個你問他「要A還B」會回「你決定就好」的天秤朋友，他會說「我真的沒意見啊」（他有）
variations: 天秤座的決定流程：列出選項 → 分析優缺點 → 問朋友意見 → 推翻所有人 → 回到第一步 → 餓到不想吃了。
天秤座說「都可以」的時候，意思不是「都可以」，是「拜託你選，我選不出來」。

en.content:
A Libra's most painful question isn't 'do you love me' —
it's 'what do you want for lunch.'

It's not that they can't decide. It's that the second they see any option, their brain instantly generates three better ones. And then they freeze.
en.editorNote: Send to the Libra friend who answers 'you pick' every single time. They'll say 'I really don't have a preference' (they do).
variations: A Libra's decision process: list the options, weigh the pros and cons, ask three friends, override everyone, return to step one, lose appetite entirely.
When a Libra says 'I'm fine with anything,' they don't mean 'anything is fine.' They mean 'please choose for me, I can't.'

items.sourceNote: Aries paradox — opinionated but indecisive, fiery but soft, deletes own post five minutes after posting because 'that's not who I am anymore'

zh-tw.content:
牡羊座可以五分鐘前發一則限動，五分鐘後刪掉——
理由很簡單：「那已經不是我了。」

他不是情緒不穩定，他只是更新版本的速度比軟體還快。每一個當下都是真的，問題是當下太短。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個動態剛發完就刪掉的牡羊朋友，他會說「我又不是那個我了，留著幹嘛」
variations: 牡羊座的人格設定每天 reset 一次，請不要把昨天的他套用在今天。
牡羊座道歉的速度跟生氣的速度一樣快——快到你都還沒反應過來吵架已經結束了。

en.content:
An Aries can post a story at 3:00, then delete it at 3:05 —
the reason is simple: 'that's not who I am anymore.'

They're not unstable. They just patch and update faster than most software. Every moment is real. The problem is the moment is very short.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aries friend whose stories vanish ten minutes after going up. They'll say 'I'm not that version of me anymore, why keep it.'
variations: An Aries resets their personality once a day. Please do not apply yesterday's version to today.
An Aries apologizes as fast as they got mad — so fast the fight is over before you realized one started.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius brutal honesty — says what everyone is thinking but won't say, calls it 'just being real', then is confused when feelings get hurt

zh-tw.content:
射手座說：「我不是白目，我只是誠實。」
房間裡每個人同時抬頭——這已經是這禮拜第三次了。

他不是故意傷人，他只是覺得：「事實本來就長這樣，怎麼變成是我的問題？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個會在你新髮型剛剪完就脫口而出「你確定嗎」的射手朋友，他會說「不然你要我騙你？」
variations: 射手座的安慰公式：5% 同理心 + 95% 你自己想想看是不是這樣。
射手座不是嘴賤，他只是把「想到什麼就講」當成一種社交才華。

en.content:
A Sagittarius will say: 'I'm not rude, I'm just honest.'
Everyone in the room looks up at the same time — it's the third time this week.

They don't mean to hurt anyone. They just genuinely believe: 'the facts are the facts, how did that suddenly become my problem?'
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius friend who blurts out 'are you sure about that haircut' the second you walk in. They'll say 'what, you want me to lie?'
variations: A Sagittarius's comfort formula: 5% empathy + 95% 'have you considered that maybe it's actually your fault.'
A Sagittarius isn't blunt — they treat 'saying whatever comes to mind' as a social skill.

items.sourceNote: Pisces daydream chaos — half in reality half in imagination, cries at commercials, walks into rooms and forgets why, runs on caffeine and feelings

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座站在廚房，手裡拿著湯匙——
但他已經不記得是來拿湯匙、還是來放湯匙、還是來找另一樣東西順便看到湯匙。

他不是健忘，他只是同時活在三個平行宇宙，剛好這個宇宙的記憶比較淡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個會看廣告看到哭、但記不得自己午餐吃什麼的雙魚朋友，他會說「對啊我也覺得我很怪」
variations: 雙魚座的待辦清單寫得很認真，做不做是另一回事——主要是寫的時候已經很有成就感了。
雙魚座的情緒沒有開關，只有水龍頭，而且還是壞的。

en.content:
A Pisces stands in the kitchen, holding a spoon —
but they no longer remember if they came to get the spoon, put away the spoon, or were looking for something else and noticed the spoon.

They're not forgetful. They just live in three parallel universes at once, and this one's memory happens to be a little faint.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces friend who cried at a coffee commercial but can't remember what they had for lunch. They'll say 'yeah I know, I'm aware.'
variations: A Pisces writes a very detailed to-do list. Whether they actually do any of it is unrelated — writing it already felt productive.
A Pisces's emotions don't have an on/off switch. They have a faucet, and it's broken.

items.sourceNote: Gemini overthinking dual energy — argues with themselves in the shower, drafts a text for 40 minutes then sends 'k', has 5 group chats and ignores all of them

zh-tw.content:
雙子座在洗澡的時候，會自己跟自己吵架。
更可怕的是——他兩邊都會贏。

他不是有兩個人格，他只是腦袋裡同時開了七個分頁，每一個都在跟他爭辯哪一個才是真的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個訊息打了四十分鐘最後傳「嗯」的雙子朋友，他會說「我有先打很多，只是想想還是算了」
variations: 雙子座的群組永遠開著、永遠未讀——他真的有看，只是不知道要回什麼，所以就先放著。
問雙子座「你覺得呢」，他會給你三個答案，然後跟你說「但我也不一定這樣覺得」。

en.content:
A Gemini argues with themselves in the shower.
The scary part — they win both sides.

They don't have two personalities. They just have seven mental tabs open at once, and each one is debating which one is the real one.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini friend who drafted a paragraph for forty minutes and ended up sending 'k.' They'll say 'I typed a lot, I just thought about it and decided not to send it.'
variations: A Gemini's group chats are always open, always unread — they read everything, they just don't know what to say, so they leave it for later.
Ask a Gemini 'what do you think?' They'll give you three answers, then add 'but I don't necessarily think any of these.'

items.sourceNote: Cancer traits — emotionally precise memory, would rather hug than roast, super sensitive to vibes

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座可以忘記你的生日，
但忘不了你三年前那句「還好啦」是什麼語氣。

別人是用腦袋記事情，巨蟹座是用心臟——壞處是會痛，好處是永遠不會檔案損毀。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個會因為一句話想三天的巨蟹朋友，他會傳一個點點點然後說「對啦我就是這樣」
variations: 巨蟹座不是記仇，他只是記得很清楚——清楚到自己都想關機重開。
巨蟹座的安全感不是靠話建立的，是靠你有沒有在他難過的時候剛好出現。

en.content:
A Cancer might forget your birthday,
but they remember the exact tone you used three years ago when you said 'it's fine.'

Other people remember things with their brain. Cancers remember with their chest — the downside is it aches, the upside is the file never corrupts.
en.editorNote: Send to the Cancer friend who replays one sentence in their head for three days. They'll send back a '...' and 'yeah that's me.'
variations: A Cancer doesn't hold grudges — they just remember everything in HD, and even they wish they could clear the cache.
A Cancer's sense of safety isn't built on words. It's built on whether you showed up when they were quietly falling apart.

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — natural performer, needs attention but pretends not to, will absolutely notice if you didn't react to their post

zh-tw.content:
獅子座說「我不在意別人的看法」——
講完之後會偷偷看你有沒有在聽。

他不是愛面子，他只是希望被看見、被肯定、被記得，順便被誇一下。要求其實不高，三項就好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個發完限動每三分鐘看一次觀看數的獅子朋友，他會說「我哪有」然後繼續看
variations: 獅子座不會主動討讚，他只會把事情做得讓你不得不誇——這叫被動式發光。
獅子座最痛苦的不是被罵，是被忽略。你罵他至少代表你還在看。

en.content:
A Leo says 'I don't care what people think' —
then sneaks a glance to check if you were listening.

It's not that they're vain. They just want to be seen, acknowledged, remembered, and maybe complimented. Honestly, three out of four is fine.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who refreshes their story views every three minutes. They'll say 'I don't do that' while doing it.
variations: A Leo won't beg for compliments — they'll just do something so well you have no choice but to give one. Call it passive shining.
The worst thing you can do to a Leo isn't insult them — it's ignore them. At least an insult means you noticed.

items.sourceNote: Virgo traits — deadpan critic, fixes everything without credit, won't tell you the answer they already worked out in their head

zh-tw.content:
處女座不會跟你吵架，
他只會在心裡列出你哪裡錯了，分點、編號、附上日期。

他不是冷漠，他只是早就把事情想完了——只是覺得講出來會讓場面更難看，所以選擇默默存檔。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個嘴上說「都可以」但其實心裡有個Excel的處女朋友，他會說「我是真的可以」然後繼續整理
variations: 處女座的「我沒事」分三種：真的沒事、有事但不想講、有事而且我已經放棄拯救你了。
處女座幫你改好的東西不會跟你說，他只會看你下次有沒有再犯。

en.content:
A Virgo won't argue with you.
They'll just mentally list everything you got wrong — bulleted, numbered, time-stamped.

They're not cold. They've already finished thinking through the whole situation. They just decided saying it out loud would make things uglier, so they filed it away instead.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo friend who says 'I'm chill with anything' while running a private spreadsheet. They'll say 'no really, I'm chill,' then keep updating the spreadsheet.
variations: A Virgo's 'I'm fine' has three versions: actually fine, not fine but won't say it, and not fine and has emotionally given up on helping you.
A Virgo will quietly fix what you broke and never mention it. They're just watching to see if you do it again.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius traits — chaotic optimist, blunt honesty, books a flight to cope, abandons responsibility for vibes

zh-tw.content:
射手座解決壓力的方式：
買一張機票，先飛再說。

回來之後問題還在嗎？在。但他已經是另一個人了——一個曬過太陽、吃過異國料理、心情有點好的人。問題會自己排隊等他處理。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個前一天還在說很累、隔天已經在機場打卡的射手朋友，他會說「人生苦短啊」
variations: 射手座不是不負責任，他只是覺得快樂比較急——責任又跑不掉，可以晚一點。
射手座說的話不一定是真的，但他講的當下是真的這樣覺得——這兩件事在他身上不衝突。

en.content:
A Sagittarius's stress management plan:
book a flight, deal with it later.

Will the problem still be there when they come back? Yes. But they'll be a different person — one who got some sun, ate something weird and delicious, and feels mildly okay. The problems can take a number.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius friend who said they were exhausted yesterday and is now posting from an airport. They'll say 'life is short' and mean it.
variations: A Sagittarius isn't irresponsible — they just think happiness is more time-sensitive. The responsibilities aren't going anywhere, they can wait.
What a Sagittarius says isn't always true, but they fully believed it in the moment they said it. To them, those two things aren't contradictory.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn rest guilt — schedules relaxation like a meeting, can't enjoy a day off without feeling behind, treats burnout as a personality flex

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座的休息方式：
把「休息」排進行事曆，從幾點到幾點，計時開始。

結果躺在床上滑手機，腦子裡還在跑下週的待辦清單——他不是不會休息，他只是休息的時候也在工作。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「我這週末要好好放鬆」結果週日晚上開始打開筆電的摩羯朋友，他會說「我只是看一下而已」
variations: 摩羯座覺得有空就是浪費——空檔不是用來休息的，是用來把下一件事提前做完的。
問摩羯座興趣是什麼，他會想很久，然後說「工作算嗎」。

en.content:
How a Capricorn rests:
they block 'relaxation' into their calendar, set a start time, set an end time, go.

Then they lie in bed scrolling while their brain runs next week's to-do list — it's not that they can't rest, it's that they're still working while they rest.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn friend who said 'this weekend I'm finally unplugging' and opened their laptop by Sunday night. They'll say 'I'm just checking one thing.'
variations: A Capricorn sees free time as wasted time — gaps in the schedule exist to get ahead on the next thing, not to rest.
Ask a Capricorn what their hobbies are. They'll think for a long time and then say, 'Does work count?'

items.sourceNote: Aquarius detachment paradox — talks for hours about ideas, theories, aliens, the universe; goes silent the moment a conversation gets emotional; thinks everyone is too much

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座可以跟你聊外星人聊三小時，
但你說「我們需要談一下我們的關係」，他會立刻當機。

不是他不在乎，他超在乎——只是他不知道要把「在乎」這件事用語言講出來是什麼程序，所以他選擇先離線一下。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個什麼話題都能聊但你一講感情就消失的水瓶朋友，他會說「我有在聽啊，只是在想要怎麼回」（然後再過三天才回）
variations: 水瓶座的「我需要空間」翻譯過來是：「我現在不知道我自己在感覺什麼，等我想清楚再回你」，可能會花一個禮拜。
水瓶座很喜歡你，但他表達喜歡的方式是傳一篇兩萬字的科普文章給你看。

en.content:
An Aquarius will talk to you about aliens for three hours.
Say 'we need to talk about us' and they freeze on the spot.

It's not that they don't care, they care a lot — they just don't know the protocol for turning 'caring' into words, so they log off for a bit.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius friend who can debate anything but disappears the moment feelings come up. They'll say 'I'm listening, I'm just figuring out how to respond' — and respond three days later.
variations: An Aquarius saying 'I need space' translates to: 'I don't know what I'm feeling right now, I'll get back to you once I figure it out.' This may take a week.
An Aquarius likes you very much. Their way of expressing this is sending you a 20,000-word article about astrophysics.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio quiet observation — sits in silence in group settings, memorizes every detail, knows who's lying within ten minutes, reveals nothing about themselves

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座在聚會上看起來最安靜，
但他離場以後可以告訴你：誰跟誰最近怪怪的、誰講話前後矛盾、誰其實不想來。

他不是不講話，他是在收資料——你以為他在發呆，其實他在整理你們所有人的人物設定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會全程很安靜但隔天傳訊息「欸我跟你說我發現喔⋯⋯」的天蠍朋友，他會說「對啊我都有在看」
variations: 天蠍座記住的不是你說了什麼，是你說那句話的時候眼神往哪裡飄。
天蠍座的「沒事」有非常多層含意，建議不要照字面解讀。

en.content:
A Scorpio looks like the quietest person at the party.
But once they leave, they can tell you exactly who's been weird with who, whose story didn't add up, and who didn't actually want to be there.

They're not being quiet, they're collecting data — you think they're zoning out, they're updating the character files on everyone in the room.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio friend who barely said a word at the party but texted you the next day 'hey so I noticed something...' They'll say 'yeah I was watching.'
variations: A Scorpio doesn't remember what you said. They remember where your eyes went when you said it.
A Scorpio's 'it's nothing' has many layers. Do not take it at face value.

items.sourceNote: Pisces escape artist — uses naps, fantasy, water, movies, anything to escape reality; emotional sponge; lives multiple imaginary lives daily

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座今天不在地球上。
他人在這裡，但靈魂在某個他想像出來的場景裡——可能是電影裡、可能是十年後的自己、可能是還沒發生的對話。

你叫他他會回應，但他眼神會慢半拍——因為他要先從那個世界回來，才能跟你講話。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個經常放空、被叫的時候會「啊？嗯？對啊」的雙魚朋友，他會說「我剛剛在想一件事」（其實是三件事同時想）
variations: 雙魚座的「我沒事」可能是真的沒事，也可能是他正在腦內演一場我們都不知道的悲劇。
雙魚座一天可以活過七個平行人生，全部都很投入——這就是為什麼他下午會這麼累。

en.content:
A Pisces is not on Earth today.
They're physically here, but their soul is somewhere they made up — maybe inside a movie, maybe ten years from now, maybe in a conversation that hasn't happened yet.

Call their name and they'll respond, but their eyes will lag by half a beat — because they have to come back from that other place first before they can talk to you.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces friend who zones out constantly and responds with 'huh? oh yeah, for sure' when you say their name. They'll say 'I was just thinking about something' — actually three somethings, simultaneously.
variations: A Pisces saying 'I'm fine' might genuinely mean fine, or might mean they're starring in a private tragedy in their head that none of us know about.
A Pisces can live through seven parallel lives in one day, fully committed to each. That's why they're exhausted by 3pm.

items.sourceNote: Taurus stubbornness — 'I'm not stubborn, my way is just better' archetype; calm, committed, refuses to be wrong

zh-tw.content:
金牛座不會跟你吵架，
他會很冷靜地聽你講完，點點頭，然後繼續做他原本要做的事。

他不是不尊重你的意見——他是聽完了、想過了、覺得他的方法還是比較好，所以結論不變。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個你怎麼勸都沒用、最後還是照他自己的方式做的金牛朋友，他會說「對啊我有聽，但我還是覺得這樣比較好」
variations: 金牛座的「好喔」分兩種：一種是真的好喔，一種是「我聽到了但我不會改」。
金牛座一旦決定了就不會回頭——除非他自己想回頭，那是另一回事，不要混為一談。

en.content:
A Taurus won't fight you.
They'll calmly let you finish, nod, and then go right back to doing what they were already doing.

It's not that they don't respect your opinion — they heard it, considered it, and decided their way is still better. The conclusion stands.
en.editorNote: Send to the Taurus friend who listened to all your advice and then did the opposite anyway. They'll say 'yeah I heard you, I just still think my way is better'
variations: A Taurus's 'okay' comes in two flavors: actual okay, and 'I heard you but I'm not changing anything.'
Once a Taurus decides, they don't turn back — unless they decide to turn back, which is different, please don't confuse the two.

items.sourceNote: Libra indecision — 'I'm not indecisive, I'm considering all options'; people-pleasing; struggles with simple choices

zh-tw.content:
問天秤座「中午吃什麼」是一種精神攻擊。

他會反問你：「你想吃什麼？」你說都可以，他說「那你決定」，你決定了他說「可是⋯⋯」——三十分鐘過去了，你們還站在門口。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次點餐都是最後一個決定、決定完還會問你「你覺得我這樣選對嗎」的天秤朋友，他會說「不然你以為我為什麼那麼瘦」
variations: 天秤座不是不會選，是他每個選項都看到了好處跟壞處——選了 A 會想 B，選了 B 會想 A，乾脆兩個都不選。
天秤座的「都可以」是真的都可以，但你選完之後他可能會默默後悔——不是怪你，是怪那個沒被選的選項。

en.content:
Asking a Libra 'what do you want for lunch' is psychological warfare.

They'll ask you back: 'What do YOU want?' You say anything. They say 'you pick.' You pick. They say 'but...' — thirty minutes later, you're both still standing at the door.
en.editorNote: Send to the Libra friend who's always the last to order and then asks 'did I pick the right thing?' They'll say 'why do you think I stay this thin'
variations: A Libra isn't bad at choosing — they just see the pros and cons of every option. Pick A, they think about B. Pick B, they think about A. So they pick neither.
A Libra's 'anything is fine' is genuinely fine — but after you pick, they may quietly mourn the option you didn't choose. Not blaming you, just grieving the road not taken.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius paradox — friendly yet detached, deep in random topics but freezes at emotional conversations; uses humor and facts to deflect feelings

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座可以跟你討論宇宙、章魚的智商、為什麼飛機餐都不好吃，但你說「我們可以聊聊嗎」，他會說：「現在嗎？」

他不是逃避，他只是需要時間整理——大概一個禮拜，或者下輩子，看哪個先到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個什麼話題都聊得起來、但你一講感情就改變話題的水瓶朋友，他會說「我有要回啊，只是還沒想好怎麼講」
variations: 水瓶座不是冷漠，他只是把情緒打包好放在很深的抽屜裡——鑰匙他自己也找不到。
跟水瓶座說「我難過」，他不會抱你，他會給你一篇研究報告告訴你為什麼會難過——對他來說這就是溫柔。

en.content:
An Aquarius can talk to you about the universe, octopus intelligence, and why airline food is always bad. But say 'can we talk about us?' and they'll say: 'right now?'

They're not avoiding it. They just need time to process — about a week, or next lifetime, whichever comes first.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius friend who can chat about anything except feelings. They'll say 'I was going to reply, I just hadn't figured out how to word it yet'
variations: An Aquarius isn't cold — they just packed their emotions away in a very deep drawer, and they've lost the key themselves.
Tell an Aquarius 'I'm sad,' and they won't hug you. They'll send you a research paper explaining why you feel sad. To them, this is affection.

items.sourceNote: Libra people-pleasing — agreeing with everyone in the room, conflict-avoidant, changes opinion based on audience

zh-tw.content:
天秤座可以在同一個對話裡，同時贊同立場相反的兩個人——而且兩邊都覺得他真的懂自己。

他不是雙面人，他只是真心覺得：「兩邊講的都有道理啊。」這不是技巧，這是天賦。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個在朋友吵架時兩邊都安慰、結束之後自己回家心累的天秤朋友，他會說「我是真的覺得他們都沒錯」
variations: 天秤座不是和稀泥，他只是真心希望大家都好——只是有時候大家都好的意思就是要委屈他一個。
天秤座最累的不是選邊站，是發現他根本不想選邊——但所有人都在等他選。

en.content:
A Libra can agree with two people on opposite sides of the same conversation — and both walk away feeling truly understood.

They're not two-faced. They genuinely think: 'both sides have a point.' This isn't a skill, this is a gift.
en.editorNote: Send to the Libra friend who comforts both sides of an argument and then goes home emotionally drained. They'll say 'I really do think neither of them was wrong'
variations: A Libra isn't fence-sitting — they sincerely want everyone to be happy. The catch is that 'everyone' sometimes means everyone except them.
The most exhausting thing for a Libra isn't picking a side — it's realizing they don't want to pick at all, while everyone waits for them to.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn meme themes — works hard, success first feelings later, emotionally closed-off, money-focused

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座的待辦清單上有十件事，第一件是「完成清單上的事」，第十件是「處理一下情緒」。

你猜哪一件永遠做不完？提示：不是工作。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個下班還在回訊息、週末還在排行程的摩羯朋友，他會說「不然要幹嘛」
variations: 摩羯座的休息方式叫做「規劃下一階段的目標」，這在他們眼裡是真的有在放鬆。
問摩羯座最近過得怎樣，他會回「還行，KPI 達標了」——這對他來說已經是情感分享了。

en.content:
A Capricorn's to-do list has ten items. Number one is 'finish the list.' Number ten is 'deal with feelings.'

Guess which one never gets done? Hint: it's not the work.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn friend who's still replying to emails after hours and color-coding their weekend. They'll say 'what else would I be doing'
variations: A Capricorn's idea of rest is 'planning the next phase of goals.' In their head, this counts as relaxing.
Ask a Capricorn how they're doing and they'll say 'fine, hit my KPIs.' To them, that was emotional vulnerability.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius traits — blunt honesty, freedom-loving, extroverted introvert paradox

zh-tw.content:
射手座不是講話太直，是他真的覺得「你問了就要聽答案」。

如果你不想聽真話，請不要問射手座——他不會配合你演戲，他連演自己都很懶。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個被射手朋友一句話戳到、但又不能反駁的人，他大概只能說「對啦你說得對啦」
variations: 射手座的安慰方式是：「我覺得這件事其實是你的問題。」這在他眼裡叫做幫你看清現實。
射手座在外面看起來超 E，回家立刻變 I——他不是雙面，他只是電量有限。

en.content:
A Sagittarius isn't being blunt — they genuinely believe 'if you asked, you wanted the answer.'

If you don't want the truth, don't ask a Sagittarius. They won't play along with your pretending — they barely play along with their own.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who got read for filth by a Sagittarius and couldn't even argue back. They'll say 'okay fine you're right, you're right'
variations: A Sagittarius comforts you by saying: 'honestly, I think this one's on you.' In their head, that's helping you see reality.
A Sagittarius looks like the most extroverted person at the party, then goes home and becomes a hermit. Not two-faced — just running on limited battery.

items.sourceUrl: https://www.sundaykiss.com/horoscope/巨蟹座-性格特質-優點-缺點-愛情觀-cplt1-1309995/
items.sourceNote: Cancer traits — emotionally sensitive, remembers everything, protective shell, soft inside

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座的記憶體是專門用來儲存「你三年前說過的那句話」的。

他沒有在記仇，他只是沒辦法刪除——這跟意願無關，這是系統設定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說「我沒事」但你知道他其實有事的巨蟹朋友，他會回一個表情符號然後消失三天
variations: 巨蟹座的殼是用來保護自己的，不是用來攻擊別人的——但你如果硬要敲，他會記到你下輩子。
問巨蟹座「你還在想那件事嗎」，他會說「沒有啊」——翻譯：他每天晚上洗澡的時候都在想。

en.content:
A Cancer's memory storage is reserved specifically for 'that thing you said three years ago.'

They're not holding a grudge. They just can't delete it. This isn't a choice — it's a system setting.
en.editorNote: Send to the Cancer friend who says 'I'm fine' when you both know they're not. They'll reply with one emoji and disappear for three days
variations: A Cancer's shell is for protection, not attack — but if you keep knocking on it, they'll remember you in their next life.
Ask a Cancer 'are you still thinking about that?' and they'll say 'no.' Translation: they think about it every night in the shower.

items.sourceNote: Virgo traits — perfectionism, overthinking, critical eye, helpful but exhausting standards

zh-tw.content:
處女座不是在挑剔——他只是看到了你沒看到的那七個地方需要改進。

他指出來不是要罵你，是因為他真的以為你會想知道。然後你生氣了，他現在也很困惑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個被處女座朋友默默幫你重排簡報的人，他會說「沒有啦我只是順手」（順手排了兩個小時）
variations: 處女座的腦袋裡有一個小聲音，二十四小時不停在說「這裡可以再更好」——包括他自己在內。
處女座最痛苦的不是別人不夠完美，是他自己也不夠完美——但他至少有在努力，你呢？

en.content:
A Virgo isn't being critical — they just noticed the seven things you didn't notice that could be improved.

They're not pointing it out to attack you. They genuinely thought you'd want to know. Now you're upset, and they're confused too.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose Virgo coworker quietly reformatted their entire deck. They'll say 'oh it was nothing, just took a sec' (it took two hours)
variations: A Virgo has a tiny voice in their head running 24/7 saying 'this could be better' — and yes, it's also talking about them.
The most painful thing for a Virgo isn't that others aren't perfect — it's that they aren't either. But at least they're trying. Are you?

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — needs attention, dramatic, generous but ego-driven, hates being ignored

zh-tw.content:
獅子座最不能接受的不是被罵，是被忽略。
你討厭他沒關係，他可以接受——但你如果裝作沒看到他，他會記到下個月。

獅子座的世界裡，安靜離場不是優雅，是浪費了一場本來可以很精彩的退場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個一進門就要全場注意他的獅子朋友，他會說「我哪有」然後繼續講剛剛沒講完的故事
variations: 獅子座不是愛炫耀，他只是覺得「這麼好的事不分享給大家知道，對不起這個世界」。
請不要在獅子座面前說「我覺得這件事其實沒什麼大不了」——對他來說每件事都是大事，包括今天穿什麼。

en.content:
The one thing a Leo cannot accept isn't criticism — it's being ignored.
Hate them? Fine, that's allowed. But pretend they're not there? They'll remember that for a month.

In a Leo's world, a quiet exit isn't elegant. It's wasting a perfectly good chance for a dramatic one.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who walks into a room demanding attention. They'll say 'I do not' and then keep telling that story they were telling earlier
variations: A Leo isn't showing off — they just genuinely believe 'not sharing something this good would be a disservice to humanity.'
Never tell a Leo 'honestly this isn't that big a deal.' To them, everything is a big deal — including what they're wearing today.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — intense, secretive, perceptive, all-or-nothing energy, never forgets

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座的人際關係只有兩種：
要嘛在他心裡有名字，要嘛根本不存在。

你以為他在生氣？沒有，他只是在重新分類你——從「自己人」移到「以後再說」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個被天蠍朋友已讀不回三天的人，他現在大概已經被默默歸檔了
variations: 天蠍座原諒你了不代表他忘了——他只是決定先放著，看你下次會不會再犯。
天蠍座的「沒事」有三種：真的沒事、不想說、以及「你最好自己想清楚」——你要自己判斷現在是哪一種。

en.content:
A Scorpio's relationships come in two categories:
you have a name in their head, or you don't exist.

You think they're mad? They're not. They're just reclassifying you — moving you from 'inner circle' to 'we'll see.'
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose Scorpio left them on read for three days. They've probably already been quietly filed away
variations: A Scorpio forgiving you doesn't mean they forgot. They just shelved it to see if you'll do it again.
A Scorpio's 'I'm fine' has three modes: actually fine, don't want to talk, and 'you'd better figure it out yourself.' Good luck guessing which.

items.sourceNote: Pisces traits — daydreamer, emotionally intuitive, escapist, lives half in fantasy

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座不是發呆，他正在進行一場只有他自己看得到的電影。

你叫他三次他才回神——前兩次他聽到了，但他覺得電影正好播到精彩的地方，不想暫停。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個常常眼神放空、被叫到才驚醒的雙魚朋友，他會問「啊我剛剛在哪」
variations: 雙魚座的腦袋裡同時有十條劇情線在跑，所以他偶爾會搞不清楚哪些是真的發生過的。
雙魚座最強的能力是「感覺到你不開心」，最弱的能力是「決定今晚要吃什麼」。

en.content:
A Pisces isn't zoning out. They're watching a movie only they can see.

You had to call their name three times before they answered — they heard you the first two, but the movie was at a good part and they didn't want to pause it.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces friend who stares into the middle distance until you snap them out of it. They'll say 'wait, where was I'
variations: A Pisces has ten storylines running in their head at once, which is why they sometimes can't remember which ones actually happened.
A Pisces's strongest skill is sensing that you're upset. Their weakest skill is deciding what to eat for dinner.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius traits — emotionally distant, intellectually independent, weird-on-purpose, contrarian

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座不是冷漠，他只是覺得情緒可以晚一點再處理——順位排在「研究一個沒人在意的冷知識」後面。

你問他為什麼這樣想，他會反問你：「不然呢？」——這就是他的最終答案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個明明很在乎你但表現得超像沒事的水瓶朋友，他會說「我有在乎啊只是沒講」
variations: 水瓶座的關心方式是傳一個冷門知識給你，並附註「我覺得你會喜歡」——這已經是他能做到的最浪漫的事。
問水瓶座「你怎麼想」是危險的——因為他真的會告訴你他怎麼想，而且通常跟你預期的完全不一樣。

en.content:
An Aquarius isn't cold — they just think emotions can wait. They're ranked below 'researching a fun fact nobody asked about.'

Ask them why they think that way and they'll say 'why wouldn't I?' — that's the final answer.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius friend who clearly cares about you but acts like they don't. They'll say 'I do care, I just didn't say it out loud'
variations: An Aquarius shows they care by sending you a random fact with the caption 'thought you'd like this.' This is the most romantic thing they're capable of.
Asking an Aquarius 'what do you think?' is dangerous — they'll actually tell you, and it'll be nothing like what you expected.

items.sourceNote: Gemini traits — dual nature, fast-talking, social yet inconsistent, two minds at once

zh-tw.content:
雙子座不是善變——
是他們腦袋裡同時住了兩個人，今天哪個比較大聲就聽哪個。

你問雙子「你到底想怎樣」，他自己也很想知道。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個前一秒說要早睡、下一秒約你出門的雙子朋友
variations: 和雙子座聊天像同時開了五個分頁，每個都很精彩，但他自己也忘記哪個還沒關。
雙子座的「我都可以」翻成白話是：「我等等可能會反悔，但現在真心覺得都可以。」

en.content:
A Gemini isn't flaky —
there are just two people living in their head, and they go with whoever's louder that day.

Ask a Gemini what they actually want, and honestly, they'd love to know too.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini friend who said they'd sleep early, then texted you to go out ten minutes later.
variations: Talking to a Gemini is like having five browser tabs open at once — all fascinating, and they forgot which one is still playing audio.
When a Gemini says 'I'm fine with anything,' it translates to: 'I might change my mind later, but right now I genuinely mean it.'

items.sourceNote: Virgo traits — perfectionist, detail-oriented, overthinking, helpful but critical

zh-tw.content:
處女座說「沒關係」的時候，
通常代表他已經默默把整件事重做了一遍。

他不是要挑剔——只是看到不對的地方，眼睛會自己對焦。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個幫你檢查訊息有沒有錯字、結果整段重寫的處女座朋友
variations: 處女座的腦袋有一個永遠關不掉的分頁，標題叫「我剛剛是不是哪裡講錯了」。
你說「差不多就好」，處女座聽到的是「請把所有細節再確認一次」。

en.content:
When a Virgo says 'it's fine,'
it usually means they've already quietly redone the whole thing.

They're not trying to nitpick — their eyes just auto-focus on whatever's slightly off.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo friend who offered to check your text for typos and rewrote the entire paragraph.
variations: A Virgo's brain has one tab that never closes, titled: 'Did I say something wrong back there?'
You say 'good enough.' A Virgo hears 'please double-check every single detail one more time.'

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — confident, attention-loving, generous, needs to be seen and appreciated

zh-tw.content:
獅子座不是愛出風頭——
是他們走進一個房間，注意力自己就會跟過來。

你只要記得偶爾稱讚他一下，他可以幫你扛下整片天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個很罩、但也很需要被誇的獅子朋友，順便誇他兩句
variations: 獅子座可以為你付出全部，唯一的條件是：不要在大家面前讓他下不了台。
獅子座生氣的時候最好哄——只要你的道歉夠有誠意、夠大聲、最好還有觀眾。

en.content:
A Leo isn't a show-off —
they just walk into a room and the attention follows on its own.

Throw them a little praise now and then, and they'll carry the whole sky for you.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who's got your back but also really needs the compliment — and toss in one while you're at it.
variations: A Leo will give you everything, on one condition: never make them lose face in front of a crowd.
The best way to calm an angry Leo is an apology that's sincere, loud, and ideally has an audience.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — intense, private, all-or-nothing, observant, slow to trust

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座看起來很冷淡，
其實是因為他正在默默觀察你十秒鐘，決定要不要對你掏心掏肺。

一旦他決定信你，那就是整顆心；一旦他決定不信，連已讀都懶得給。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個平常很安靜、但對你超級夠義氣的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座的「還好」有三百種意思，而你大概一種都猜不到。
別跟天蠍座玩心機，他在你開口之前，劇本早就讀完了。

en.content:
A Scorpio comes off cold,
but really they're just silently sizing you up for ten seconds, deciding whether you're worth their whole heart.

Once they trust you, it's all in. Once they don't, they won't even leave you on read — they just leave.
en.editorNote: Send to the quiet Scorpio friend who's secretly the most loyal person you know.
variations: A Scorpio's 'I'm fine' has about three hundred meanings, and you'll guess none of them.
Don't try to outmaneuver a Scorpio — they finished reading the script before you even spoke.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn traits — disciplined, ambitious, work-focused, dry humor, low-key but reliable

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座不是不會玩——
是他們連休息都先排進行事曆，玩完還會檢討這趟玩得有沒有效率。

你說「人生不只有工作」，摩羯座微笑著點頭，然後繼續工作。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個放假還在回訊息、嘴上喊累卻停不下來的摩羯朋友
variations: 摩羯座的快樂很樸實：把待辦清單一條一條劃掉，比什麼都療癒。
問摩羯座週末要幹嘛，他會給你一個比上班還滿的時間表。

en.content:
A Capricorn knows how to have fun —
they just schedule the rest into their calendar first, and review afterward whether the trip was time-efficient.

You say 'there's more to life than work.' A Capricorn smiles, nods, and gets back to work.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn friend who answers emails on vacation and swears they're exhausted but can't stop.
variations: A Capricorn's joy is simple: crossing items off a to-do list, one by one, is more soothing than any spa day.
Ask a Capricorn what they're doing this weekend and they'll hand you a schedule busier than a workday.

items.sourceNote: Gemini meme trope — switching personalities, 'deciding who to be today', fast-changing mood

zh-tw.content:
雙子座早上起床第一件事，不是刷牙，是決定今天要當哪一個版本的自己。

你以為他在敷衍你，其實他自己也搞不清楚剛剛那個是不是同一個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個情緒和話題切換比紅綠燈還快的雙子朋友，他會邊笑邊承認
variations: 跟雙子座聊天就像開了十個分頁，每個都開著，每個都很重要，但你不知道他在看哪一個。
雙子座不是雙面人，是內建多人格的社交全能組，看場合自動切換。

en.content:
The first thing a Gemini does in the morning isn't brushing their teeth — it's deciding which version of themselves to be today.

You think they're being flaky, but honestly they're not sure that was even the same person five minutes ago either.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini friend whose mood and topic switch faster than a traffic light. They'll laugh and admit it.
variations: Talking to a Gemini is like having ten tabs open — all active, all urgent, and you never know which one they're actually on.
A Gemini isn't two-faced — they're a full social multitool, auto-switching personalities by the room.

items.sourceNote: Libra meme trope — indecisive, standing between two menus, people-pleasing, craves balance

zh-tw.content:
問天秤座想吃什麼，他會說「都可以」。
你真的隨便點了，他又會說「欸不是這個」。

他不是難搞——他只是需要你先給選項，他才有辦法刪去法選出最不討厭的那個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在揪天秤朋友吃飯、來回問了半小時還沒結論的時候傳給他
variations: 天秤座的「我沒差」是全宇宙最危險的三個字，因為他其實超有差。
天秤座站在兩家餐廳中間掙扎的樣子，比任何人生重大決定都還糾結。

en.content:
Ask a Libra what they want to eat and they'll say 'anything's fine.'
Then you actually pick something and they go, 'eh, not that.'

They're not difficult — they just need you to lay out the options so they can eliminate their way to the least-objectionable one.
en.editorNote: Send to the Libra friend you've been texting for half an hour about dinner with still no decision in sight.
variations: A Libra's 'I don't mind' is the three most dangerous words in the universe, because they absolutely do mind.
Watching a Libra agonize between two restaurants is more intense than any major life decision they've ever made.

items.sourceNote: Aries meme trope — bold, impulsive, ready to fight, act-first energy, low patience

zh-tw.content:
牡羊座的耐心有效期限大概是三秒。
超過三秒還沒結果，他就準備自己上場了。

你說「再等等看嘛」，牡羊座已經做完、搞砸、重來、又做完一輪了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個排隊排到一半就想直接衝去問店員的牡羊朋友
variations: 牡羊座吵架不過夜，因為他連十分鐘都嫌久，氣完就忘，回頭還問你剛剛在氣什麼。
牡羊座的「我來處理」聽起來很可靠，但通常代表事情即將以最快也最猛的方式發生。

en.content:
An Aries's patience has a shelf life of about three seconds.
Nothing happens by then? They're already stepping in to do it themselves.

You say 'let's just wait and see.' Meanwhile the Aries has already done it, botched it, redone it, and finished a second time.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aries friend who, halfway through a line, decides to just go ask the staff directly.
variations: An Aries never goes to bed angry — ten minutes is too long for them. They blow up, forget it, then ask you what you were even mad about.
When an Aries says 'I'll handle it,' it sounds reassuring, but it usually means things are about to happen the fastest and most chaotic way possible.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius traits — extroverted, adventurous, blunt honesty, freedom-loving, hates being tied down

zh-tw.content:
射手座答應你的事，要看那天的風往哪裡吹。
不是不負責——是他真心相信「臨時有更好玩的事」也是一種正當理由。

想綁住射手座，最快的方法就是告訴他「你一定要來」，他立刻開始想怎麼跑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個常常臨時放鳥、但你又捨不得生氣的射手朋友
variations: 射手座的真心話從不過濾，傷到你不是故意的，他只是覺得「事實就是這樣啊」。
射手座的人生計畫只有一條：先別把自己卡死，剩下的之後再說。

en.content:
Whether a Sagittarius keeps a promise depends on which way the wind's blowing that day.
It's not that they're unreliable — they genuinely believe 'something more fun came up' is a perfectly valid excuse.

The fastest way to lose a Sagittarius is to tell them 'you HAVE to come.' Instantly they start plotting their escape.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius friend who flakes last-minute but you somehow can't stay mad at.
variations: A Sagittarius never filters their honesty. If they hurt your feelings, it's not on purpose — they just figure 'that's the truth, though.'
A Sagittarius's life plan has exactly one rule: don't box yourself in. Everything else is a later problem.

items.sourceNote: Pisces traits — introverted, dreamy, escapes into own head, sensitive, retreats to recharge

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座以為自己是E人，直到聚會進行到一半，才發現自己已經神遊到另一個星球。

他人在現場，靈魂早就回家洗澡睡覺了，只是禮貌上還掛著一個微笑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會時眼神放空、被點到名才回神的雙魚朋友
variations: 雙魚座的內心戲，比任何一齣連續劇都還精彩，可惜全劇只有他一個觀眾。
雙魚座需要的不是社交，是一個可以安靜把自己放空的角落，越久越好。

en.content:
A Pisces thinks they're an extrovert — right up until halfway through the party, when they realize their mind has already drifted off to another planet.

Their body's still in the room, but their soul went home, showered, and got into bed hours ago. The smile is purely out of politeness.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces friend who zones out at gatherings and only snaps back when someone says their name.
variations: A Pisces's inner world is more dramatic than any TV series — too bad it's got an audience of exactly one.
What a Pisces needs isn't socializing — it's a quiet corner to space out in, and the longer the better.

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — needs to be center of attention, high-energy extrovert, organizes everyone

zh-tw.content:
獅子座不是愛現——
他們只是覺得，如果一個場合沒有人注意到自己，那這個場合根本沒有開始。

你以為他在炒熱氣氛，其實他是在確認：「我還在發光吧？對吧？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個一進場就自動變成全場焦點、還覺得這很正常的獅子朋友
variations: 獅子座的人生哲學：場子可以冷，但我不能被忽略。
獅子座最大的恐懼不是失敗，是聚會裡沒有人問他「欸你最近怎麼樣」。

en.content:
A Leo isn't a show-off —
they just genuinely believe that if no one's paying attention to them, the event hasn't technically started yet.

You think they're hyping up the room. Really they're just checking: 'I'm still glowing, right? Right?'
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who becomes the center of the room the second they walk in and thinks that's perfectly normal.
variations: A Leo's life philosophy: the party can be dead, but I cannot be overlooked.
A Leo's biggest fear isn't failure — it's a gathering where nobody asks 'so how've you been?'

items.sourceNote: Cancer traits — introverted homebody, overthinks, prefers small circle on the couch

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座最理想的週末，是答應了三個聚會，然後三個都取消，最後窩在沙發上鬆一口氣。

他不是不想出門，是出門前光是想像現場有多累，就已經先累完一輪了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次都說好要來、最後傳「我突然好累」的巨蟹朋友
variations: 巨蟹座的社交電量，出門前就用想的先耗掉一半。
巨蟹座的快樂很簡單：一張沙發、兩三個熟到不用講話的人，門關起來最好。

en.content:
A Cancer's ideal weekend is saying yes to three hangouts, watching all three get canceled, and then sighing with relief on the couch.

It's not that they don't want to go out. It's that just imagining how draining it'll be tires them out before they've even left.
en.editorNote: Send to the Cancer friend who always says they're coming, then texts 'I'm suddenly so tired' at the last minute.
variations: A Cancer burns half their social battery just thinking about leaving the house.
A Cancer's happiness is simple: one couch, two or three people they don't have to talk to, and a door that closes.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — ambivert, intense, shows up then bolts when crowds get too big

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座在聚會裡會經歷兩個階段：前半場像煙火一樣燦爛，後半場已經在門口計算回家的最佳路線。

他不是冷淡，是電量有限——而他選擇把電留給真正在意的那兩三個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會前段超嗨、後段突然消失的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座可以很熱情，也可以瞬間關機，中間沒有過渡，只有他自己知道的開關。
天蠍座記得你說過的每一句話，包括你以為他沒在聽的那幾句。

en.content:
A Scorpio goes through two phases at any party: the first half they sparkle like a firework, the second half they're already at the door calculating the fastest route home.

It's not that they're cold — their battery's just limited, and they choose to save it for the two or three people who actually matter.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio friend who's electric early in the night and mysteriously gone by the end.
variations: A Scorpio can be all warmth one moment and fully powered down the next — no in-between, just a switch only they can see.
A Scorpio remembers every word you said, including the ones you thought they weren't listening to.

items.sourceNote: Libra traits — indecisive, overthinks every choice, keeps the peace

zh-tw.content:
問天秤座「你想吃什麼」，等於發起一場為期三十分鐘、最後以「都可以」收場的會議。

他不是沒有意見，是太怕選錯讓大家不開心，所以乾脆把決定權整包退還給你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個被問想吃什麼就開始當機的天秤朋友，附上一句「我已經幫你選好了」
variations: 天秤座的「都可以」不是隨便，是他在腦中把所有選項評估完之後，發現每個都有缺點的結論。
天秤座最大的痛苦，是在兩個一樣好的選項之間，被迫放棄其中一個。

en.content:
Asking a Libra 'what do you want to eat?' is basically launching a thirty-minute meeting that ends with 'I don't mind, you pick.'

It's not that they have no opinion. They're just so afraid of choosing wrong and making everyone unhappy that they hand the whole decision right back to you.
en.editorNote: Send to the Libra friend who freezes the moment you ask what they want for dinner — bonus points if you add 'I already picked for you.'
variations: A Libra's 'I don't mind' isn't laziness — it's the conclusion they reach after mentally evaluating every option and finding a flaw in each.
A Libra's deepest suffering is being forced to give up one of two equally good options.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn traits — workaholic, late-night emails while others party, goal-driven

zh-tw.content:
別人滑社群的時候，摩羯座在回信；別人在派對的時候，摩羯座在想下一季的目標。

他不是不會玩，是覺得「先把事情做完」這件事，本身就是他的娛樂。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個凌晨還在回工作訊息、還回你「我覺得這樣很正常」的摩羯朋友
variations: 摩羯座的休息方式，是把待辦清單清空之後，再列一份新的。
摩羯座不太說自己累，因為他覺得說了也不會少做，不如把時間拿去做完。

en.content:
While everyone else is scrolling, a Capricorn is answering emails. While everyone else is at the party, a Capricorn is mapping out next quarter's goals.

It's not that they can't have fun — they just consider 'getting things done first' to be a form of entertainment.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn friend still replying to work messages at 1am who tells you 'this is totally normal.'
variations: A Capricorn's idea of relaxing is clearing the whole to-do list, then writing a brand new one.
A Capricorn rarely admits they're tired — saying it won't lighten the load, so they'd rather spend that energy finishing the job.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — long memory, holds grudges, calm exterior over intense inner world

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座表面上風平浪靜，心裡其實還在重播你五年前說過的那句話。

他不是記仇，他只是記性好——而且特別會挑重點記。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個笑著跟你聊天、但你總覺得他什麼都記得的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座的「沒事啊」分兩種：一種是真的沒事，一種是事情大到他決定自己消化。你得自己分辨。
惹到天蠍座不會馬上有報應，他只是把這件事收進抽屜，等一個剛剛好的時機。

en.content:
A Scorpio looks perfectly calm on the surface — meanwhile they're internally replaying something you said five years ago.

It's not that they hold grudges. They just have an excellent memory, and a real talent for remembering the important parts.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio friend who chats with a smile but somehow remembers everything
variations: A Scorpio's 'I'm fine' comes in two flavors: actually fine, or so not fine they've decided to process it alone. Good luck telling them apart.
Crossing a Scorpio doesn't bring instant payback. They just file it away and wait for the perfect moment.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius traits — freedom-loving, ready to leave at any inconvenience, rules-averse

zh-tw.content:
射手座遇到一點點不開心，行李箱已經默默收好了。

他不是逃避，他只是覺得「換個地方」永遠是最快的解決方案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說走就走、訊息已讀就人在外縣市的射手朋友
variations: 射手座的人生規則只有一條：規則是什麼？沒聽過。
問射手座週末要幹嘛，他會說「還不知道」——然後等你看到限動，他已經在山上了。

en.content:
The second something mildly annoying happens, a Sagittarius already has their bag packed.

It's not running away. They just genuinely believe 'go somewhere else' is the fastest fix for anything.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius friend who's already two cities away by the time you see they read your text
variations: A Sagittarius has exactly one life rule: rules? Never heard of her.
Ask a Sagittarius what they're doing this weekend and they'll say 'no idea' — then you'll see their story and they're already on a mountain.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius traits — wants to blend in but stands out, unconventional, contrarian thinker

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座：「我只是想低調融入大家。」
（穿著全場最奇怪的衣服走進來）

他不是故意要與眾不同，他只是天生長得跟別人不一樣的腦袋，連想低調都會自帶聚光燈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個堅持自己很普通、但每次出現都讓全場安靜三秒的水瓶朋友
variations: 想說服水瓶座一件事，最快的方法是跟他說「大家都這樣想」——然後他就會立刻開始想別的。
水瓶座的「我跟你說一個想法」通常後面接的，是一個你這輩子沒想過的角度。

en.content:
Aquarius: 'I just want to blend in with everyone.'
(walks in wearing the single strangest outfit in the room)

They're not trying to be different. Their brain is just wired differently, so even their attempt at low-key comes with its own spotlight.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius friend who insists they're totally normal but makes the whole room go quiet for three seconds every time they show up
variations: The fastest way to lose an argument with an Aquarius is to say 'everyone thinks this way' — they'll immediately start thinking the opposite.
An Aquarius's 'let me tell you an idea' is usually followed by an angle you've genuinely never considered in your life.

items.sourceNote: Pisces traits — daydreamer, thinks they're extroverted but lives in their head

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座一直以為自己是E人，直到發現他最快樂的時刻，是約會取消、然後一個人躺著放空一整個下午。

他不是孤僻，他只是腦中那個世界太精彩，現實有時候跟不上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說好要出門、但你心裡早就知道他會臨時想耍廢的雙魚朋友
variations: 雙魚座放空的時候不是發呆，他正在腦中演完一整部電影，還順便哭了一場。
雙魚座最常說的謊是「我馬上好」，因為他正在白日夢裡，連自己什麼時候會回來都不確定。

en.content:
A Pisces is convinced they're an extrovert — right up until they realize their happiest moment is plans getting canceled so they can lie there and zone out for a whole afternoon.

It's not antisocial. The world inside their head is just so vivid that reality struggles to keep up.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces friend who said yes to going out, but you both already knew they'd bail to do nothing
variations: When a Pisces zones out, they're not spacing — they're watching an entire movie in their head and possibly crying at the ending.
A Pisces's most common lie is 'I'll be ready in a sec' — because they're deep in a daydream and genuinely don't know when they'll be back.

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — most extroverted, confident, loves attention, treated like royalty

zh-tw.content:
獅子座走進任何場合，都會自動把自己當主角——而且通常還真的成功了。

他不是愛現，他只是覺得既然燈都亮著，沒理由站在暗處。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個一進門就讓全場目光自動轉過去、還覺得很正常的獅子朋友
variations: 獅子座要的不是被誇獎，是被「真心地」誇獎——敷衍他一聽就知道，而且會記住。
獅子座的自信不是裝出來的，是他真的相信自己值得最好的——這點還挺讓人羨慕。

en.content:
A Leo walks into any room and automatically casts themselves as the main character — and honestly, it usually works.

It's not showing off. They just figure if the lights are already on, there's no reason to stand in the dark.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo friend who turns every head the moment they walk in and finds that completely normal
variations: A Leo doesn't want praise — they want genuine praise. They can spot a half-hearted compliment instantly, and they'll remember it.
A Leo's confidence isn't an act. They truly believe they deserve the best — which is honestly kind of enviable.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — surprisingly introverted, magnetic presence, first to arrive then first to leave a crowded party

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座是那種一開場最早到、人一多卻最早閃人的人。

他不是冷淡，是電力有限——前一個小時火力全開，後面就只想找個角落安靜地觀察全場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會中途突然人間蒸發、隔天才回你「我先回家了」的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座的安靜不是沒話講，是他正在把整個房間的人默默分析一遍。
天蠍座給人的神秘感，有一半是故意的，另一半是他真的懶得解釋。

en.content:
A Scorpio is the one who shows up earliest — and bails the second the room gets crowded.

It's not that they're cold. Their social battery just runs out fast: full intensity for the first hour, then they want a quiet corner to observe everyone from.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio friend who vanishes halfway through the party and texts 'I went home' the next morning
variations: A Scorpio's silence doesn't mean they have nothing to say — they're quietly analyzing every single person in the room.
Half of a Scorpio's mysterious vibe is intentional. The other half is just them not bothering to explain.

items.sourceNote: Virgo traits — pragmatic perfectionist, introvert at heart, can navigate a crowd but not a natural performer

zh-tw.content:
處女座不是挑剔，他只是看得到那個你沒注意到的細節，然後忍不住想修好它。

他在人群裡能應付得很好，只是回到家會把今天說過的每句話重播一遍，順便檢討自己哪裡講太多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會後會反省自己「剛剛是不是太多話」的處女朋友，他需要被理解
variations: 處女座的腦中有一份永遠寫不完的待辦清單，連放鬆都要排進去才安心。
處女座說「沒事」的時候，通常已經在心裡列好三個可以改進的地方了。

en.content:
A Virgo isn't picky — they just notice the one detail you missed and physically cannot leave it unfixed.

They handle a crowd just fine. It's afterward, at home, that they replay every sentence they said and critique themselves for talking too much.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo friend who replays the whole party afterward wondering 'did I overshare?' They need to feel understood
variations: A Virgo's brain runs a to-do list that never ends — they even have to schedule relaxation just to feel okay about it.
When a Virgo says 'it's fine,' they've usually already drafted three ways it could be improved.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius group chat habits — drops chaos then goes offline, returns to dozens of missed messages asking what they missed

zh-tw.content:
射手座在群組裡的模式是：丟下一個爆炸性話題，然後人就消失了。

等他下次出現，已經有八十七則未讀，他滑都不滑，直接問：「欸我錯過什麼？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到那個被射手朋友丟了話題就跑掉、留你們在群組吵一整晚的群組裡
variations: 射手座傳訊息像在連載小說，興致一來可以一口氣丟十則，沒興致就讀都不讀。
射手座答應你的「我馬上到」，實際抵達時間誤差大約一到三小時，請自行加上緩衝。

en.content:
A Sagittarius in the group chat: drops one explosive topic, then immediately goes offline.

Next time they surface, there are 87 unread messages — which they don't read at all — and they just ask, 'Wait, what did I miss?'
en.editorNote: Send to the group chat where the Sagittarius friend lit the fuse and left the rest of you arguing all night
variations: A Sagittarius texts like a serialized novel — ten messages in a row when inspired, total radio silence when not.
When a Sagittarius says 'I'm on my way,' the actual arrival window is roughly one to three hours. Pad accordingly.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn group chat habits — the organizer, replies in full paragraphs, ignores off-topic chaos, secretly judging

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座在群組裡負責一件事：把大家的時間喬出一個真的能成行的聚會。

他會用一整段認真回正事，對於那些離題的鬼扯則完全已讀不回——不是沒看到，是默默在心裡記帳。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次出遊都靠他訂位排行程、結果還被嫌「太認真」的摩羯朋友
variations: 摩羯座不愛在群組裡發廢文，但只要他開口，通常就是事情該定案了。
摩羯座表面在已讀群組的胡鬧，其實心裡正在默默替每個人打分數。

en.content:
A Capricorn in the group chat has exactly one job: turning everyone's schedules into a plan that actually happens.

They'll reply to the real stuff in a full paragraph and leave the off-topic nonsense on read — not because they missed it, but because they're quietly keeping score.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn friend who books every reservation and plans every trip, then gets called 'too intense' for it
variations: A Capricorn rarely posts filler in the group chat — but when they do speak up, it usually means something is officially decided.
A Capricorn reads the group chat chaos in silence while quietly grading everyone in their head.

items.sourceNote: Aries in group projects — wants to lead, talks more than listens, finds compromise exhausting

zh-tw.content:
分組報告裡的牡羊座：還沒搞清楚題目，手就先舉起來說「這組我來帶」。

他不是非要當頭，只是看大家討論半天還沒結論，他整個人快憋死了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次分組都自動變組長、然後抱怨「為什麼又是我」的牡羊朋友
variations: 牡羊座開會的痛苦不是事情難，是大家講太久還在原地——他寧願先做錯再改，也不要一直空轉。
牡羊座的協調能力卡在一個地方：他真心覺得「聽我的」就是最有效率的協調。

en.content:
An Aries in a group project: hand goes up to say 'I'll lead this' before they've even finished reading the brief.

It's not that they need to be in charge. It's that watching everyone debate for twenty minutes with no decision is physically painful for them.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aries friend who somehow becomes team lead every single time, then complains 'why is it always me?'
variations: An Aries' meeting pain isn't that the work is hard — it's that people talk forever and go nowhere. They'd rather act, be wrong, and fix it than spin in place.
An Aries' idea of great teamwork is, deep down, just everyone agreeing to do it their way faster.

items.sourceNote: Gemini as ambivert — first to arrive last to leave at a party, then vanishes for a week to recharge

zh-tw.content:
雙子座是這樣的：派對第一個到、最後一個走，嗨到沒人比得過——
然後隔天人間蒸發整整一週，訊息已讀不回，像是換了一個人。

不是高冷，是電池一次用完，需要關機重開。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個聚會超能炒熱氣氛、結果隔天就消失的雙子朋友，他會說「我只是需要安靜一下」
variations: 雙子座的社交模式只有兩種：火力全開，或完全離線。中間那段叫「正在充電中」。
雙子座不是善變，是同一個人身上住了一個E人和一個I人，輪流值班。

en.content:
Gemini, in a nutshell: first to show up, last to leave, louder than anyone in the room —
then completely off the grid for a week, leaving you on read like a different person entirely.

It's not coldness. The battery just drains all at once and needs a full shutdown to reboot.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini friend who carries the whole party then vanishes the next day. They'll say 'I just needed some quiet time.'
variations: A Gemini has exactly two social modes: full blast or fully offline. The gap in between is labeled 'currently recharging.'
A Gemini isn't flaky — it's just one introvert and one extrovert sharing the same body, taking turns on shift.

items.sourceNote: Cancer emotional depth — feels everything twice, hides soft side behind a hard shell when sensing hurt

zh-tw.content:
巨蟹座的情緒不是發生一次——
是先感受一遍，回家躺著再感受一遍，睡前還要重播一次。

所以你以為的小事，在他心裡已經演到第三集了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個白天裝沒事、晚上一個人默默想很多的巨蟹朋友
variations: 巨蟹座受傷的時候不會大吵，他會默默把殼關起來——不是不在乎，是太在乎到不敢說。
巨蟹座可以記得你三年前隨口說的一句話，連語氣都記得，因為他當下真的有放在心上。

en.content:
A Cancer doesn't feel things once —
they feel it in the moment, again lying in bed at home, then one more replay right before sleep.

So that little thing you forgot about? In their head it's already on season three.
en.editorNote: Send to the Cancer friend who acts fine all day and quietly overthinks everything at night
variations: A Cancer who's hurt won't blow up — they'll quietly close the shell. It's not that they don't care; they care so much they're afraid to say it.
A Cancer can quote something you said offhand three years ago, tone and all, because they actually took it to heart at the time.

items.sourceNote: Taurus comfort-loving and resistant to change — treats trying new things as unnecessary risk

zh-tw.content:
金牛座的週末規劃：
同一家店、同一個位子、同一份餐點。

服務生問要不要試試新品，金牛座笑著拒絕——對他來說，「我喜歡的東西明明就在這裡」，幹嘛去賭一個不確定的失望。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個去餐廳永遠點同一道菜、被笑「無聊」也不為所動的金牛朋友
variations: 金牛座不是不愛冒險，是他算過——舒適圈的投資報酬率，明顯比較高。
你問金牛座「要不要換換口味」，他心裡的OS是：我又沒吃膩，換什麼？

en.content:
A Taurus' weekend plan:
same restaurant, same table, same order.

The server asks if they'd like to try the new special. A Taurus politely declines — because in their mind, 'the thing I love is right here,' so why gamble on a maybe-disappointment?
en.editorNote: Send to the Taurus friend who orders the exact same dish every time and shrugs off being called 'boring'
variations: A Taurus isn't anti-adventure — they've just run the numbers, and the comfort zone has a clearly better return on investment.
Ask a Taurus if they want to 'switch it up' and their internal reply is: I'm not even tired of it yet, so switch what?

items.sourceNote: Aquarius as the instinctive introvert — keeps aspirations private, observes before opening up

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座可以一整天不講話，也完全不覺得無聊——
他的腦袋裡早就開了十個分頁，自己跟自己聊得很開心。

你以為他孤僻，其實他只是覺得「跟人相處」這件事，預設值就是耗電。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個一個人也能過得很自在、被約出門還要先評估的水瓶朋友
variations: 水瓶座不是冷淡，是他把社交當成「需要時才開的功能」，不是隨時待命的背景程式。
水瓶座真正的好朋友不多，但只要進得了那個圈，他會用一種你想不到的方式罩你。

en.content:
An Aquarius can go a whole day without speaking and not feel bored for a second —
their head already has ten tabs open, having a great conversation entirely with themselves.

You think they're aloof. Really, they just consider 'being around people' to be a power-draining setting by default.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius friend who's perfectly content alone and quietly evaluates every invitation before saying yes
variations: An Aquarius isn't cold — they treat socializing as a feature you turn on when needed, not a background app always running.
An Aquarius doesn't have many close friends, but once you're inside the circle, they'll have your back in ways you'd never expect.

items.sourceNote: Gemini traits — dual nature, social yet flaky, talkative, introvert-extrovert hybrid

zh-tw.content:
雙子座一邊抱怨自己都沒朋友、好孤單，
一邊已讀全部人的訊息，連一句「在忙」都懶得回。

他不是高冷，他只是電量分配很奇怪——出去玩可以瘋一整晚，回家後可以失蹤三天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個約他超難、出來又最嗨的雙子朋友，他會說「你怎麼知道」
variations: 雙子座的內建設定：今天是派對動物，明天是與世隔絕的修行者，全看當天哪個人格上線。
雙子座不是難搞，他只是自己跟自己聊天就很開心，因為兩邊都很有梗。

en.content:
A Gemini will complain about having no friends and feeling so lonely —
while leaving everyone on read, too lazy to even type 'kinda busy.'

They're not playing hard to get. Their battery just allocates weirdly: party all night out, then vanish for three days at home.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini who's impossible to pin down but the life of the party once they show. They'll go: 'How did you know.'
variations: A Gemini's factory setting: party animal today, hermit on a silent retreat tomorrow — depends entirely on which personality clocked in.
A Gemini isn't hard to deal with. They just have a great time talking to themselves, because both sides are hilarious.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — intense, observant, says little but notices everything, guarded

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座最可怕的不是嘴巴毒，
是他什麼都不說，卻什麼都記得。

你以為那件事過去了，其實他只是把它收進心裡的資料夾，編號、上鎖、永久保存。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個平常很安靜、但你絕對不想得罪的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座的安靜不是沒意見，是他正在默默觀察，然後把每個人看得一清二楚。
對天蠍座好，他會記一輩子；對他不好，他也會記一輩子，差別只在他不會告訴你而已。

en.content:
The scary thing about a Scorpio isn't the sharp tongue.
It's that they say nothing — and remember everything.

You think it blew over. Really, they just filed it away in a folder in their heart: numbered, locked, kept forever.
en.editorNote: Send to the quiet Scorpio friend you would never, ever want to cross
variations: A Scorpio's silence doesn't mean no opinion. It means they're quietly observing — and reading everyone like a book.
Be good to a Scorpio and they'll remember forever. Be bad to one and they'll also remember forever. The only difference is they won't tell you.

items.sourceNote: Virgo traits — perfectionist, detail-obsessed, critical, secretly caring

zh-tw.content:
處女座不是愛挑剔，
是他真的看得到別人看不到的那個歪了 0.5 公分的地方。

而且看到之後，他的一整天就毀了，但他還是會假裝沒事，默默把它喬正。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個嘴上嫌東嫌西、其實默默幫你把所有細節都顧好的處女座
variations: 處女座的碎念其實是一種愛，只是包裝得很像在罵人。
處女座最大的痛苦：看到問題、知道怎麼解決，但又不好意思直接幫你改。

en.content:
A Virgo isn't nitpicky.
They genuinely see the thing that's tilted by half a centimeter — the thing no one else can see.

And once they see it, their whole day is ruined. But they'll pretend it's fine and quietly straighten it anyway.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo who grumbles about everything but quietly handles every detail for you
variations: A Virgo's nagging is actually love — just packaged to sound exactly like criticism.
A Virgo's biggest pain: spotting the problem, knowing the fix, but feeling too awkward to just correct it for you.

items.sourceNote: Leo traits — confident, spotlight-loving, generous, needs validation

zh-tw.content:
獅子座的自信不是裝出來的，是一種生活方式。

他可以一秒走進任何場合，把自己活成全場的主角——但回到家，他其實很需要有人跟他說一句：你今天真的很棒。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個看起來超有自信、其實也想被肯定的獅子朋友
variations: 獅子座願意把最好的都分給你，唯一的回報是：請看見他、請誇他、請讓他知道他很重要。
獅子座不是愛出風頭，是他真心覺得「站在中間」這個位置，本來就是為他準備的。

en.content:
A Leo's confidence isn't an act — it's a lifestyle.

They can walk into any room and instantly become the main character. But back home, they really do need someone to say: you were amazing today.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo who looks unstoppably confident but quietly wants to be appreciated too
variations: A Leo will give you their absolute best. The only payment they ask: see them, praise them, let them know they matter.
A Leo isn't a spotlight hog. They sincerely believe that 'center stage' was simply built for them.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio traits — intense, never forgets, holds grudges quietly, loyal once trusted

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座可以原諒你，
但他絕對不會忘記。

他表面上跟你有說有笑，心裡那本帳早就翻到第幾頁、哪一行、哪個標點符號都記得清清楚楚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個看起來雲淡風輕、其實什麼都記得的天蠍朋友，他會回你一個意味深長的微笑
variations: 天蠍座的記仇是有層次的：小事一笑置之，大事默默存檔，永久保存、不會過期。
你以為天蠍座不在意，其實他只是還沒決定要怎麼讓你知道他很在意。

en.content:
A Scorpio can forgive you.
But they will never forget.

They'll laugh and chat with you on the surface, while internally knowing exactly which page, which line, and which punctuation mark of the ledger you're on.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio who acts unbothered but secretly remembers everything. They'll reply with a knowing little smile.
variations: A Scorpio's grudges come in tiers: small stuff gets brushed off, big stuff gets quietly archived — saved forever, no expiration date.
You think a Scorpio doesn't care. They just haven't decided yet how they want to let you know they do.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius traits — blunt honesty, freedom-loving, oversharing, optimistic

zh-tw.content:
射手座不會說謊，
他只是會把真話一次講太多。

你問他「我這樣穿好看嗎」，他不只回答你的問題，還會順便分析你過去三套的失敗原因。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個嘴巴沒有把關、但你知道他絕對不會騙你的射手朋友
variations: 射手座的優點是誠實，缺點是太誠實，而且通常是在你最不需要誠實的時候。
射手座給的自由很大方——大方到你有時候會懷疑他是不是根本忘了你的存在。

en.content:
A Sagittarius doesn't lie.
They just tell you way too much truth at once.

Ask them 'does this look good on me?' and they won't just answer — they'll throw in a full analysis of why your last three outfits failed.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius friend with zero filter who you know would never lie to you
variations: A Sagittarius's best trait is honesty. Their worst trait is too much honesty — usually delivered exactly when you needed it least.
A Sagittarius gives you so much freedom that sometimes you start wondering if they just forgot you exist.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn traits — ambitious, tired of nonsense, schedules everything including rest

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座不是累，
是累於應付別人的廢話。

他連休息都要排進行事曆，因為對摩羯來說，「放鬆」也是一項要認真執行的待辦事項。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個把人生過得像專案管理、連發呆都要先安排時間的摩羯朋友
variations: 摩羯座的浪漫是：先把事業跟存款顧好，感情的事，等我有空再說。
摩羯座看起來很冷淡，其實他只是把所有的力氣都拿去達成目標了，沒有多餘的給你看表情。

en.content:
A Capricorn isn't tired.
They're tired of dealing with everyone else's nonsense.

They schedule rest into their calendar, because to a Capricorn, 'relaxing' is also a to-do item that must be executed properly.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn who runs their life like project management and pencils in time just to zone out
variations: A Capricorn's idea of romance: handle the career and savings first; we'll get to feelings once I have a free slot.
A Capricorn seems cold, but they've just funneled all their energy into hitting their goals — none left over for facial expressions.

items.sourceNote: Gemini traits — dual nature, social then disappears, first to arrive last to leave

zh-tw.content:
雙子座是聚會第一個到、最後一個走的人，
然後接下來一整個禮拜你都找不到他。

他不是生氣，也不是失蹤——他只是把這禮拜的社交電量一次用完，現在正在離線充電。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個忽冷忽熱、其實只是在E人跟I人之間切換的雙子朋友
variations: 雙子座同時是I人也是E人，端看你問的是哪一個他。
和雙子座相處的難處：你永遠不知道今天出現的是想聊到天亮的他，還是只想已讀不回的他。

en.content:
A Gemini is the first to arrive at the party and the last to leave —
and then you can't reach them for an entire week.

They're not mad, and they didn't vanish. They just spent this week's whole social battery at once, and now they're offline, recharging.
en.editorNote: Send to the hot-and-cold Gemini who's really just toggling between their introvert and extrovert mode
variations: A Gemini is both an introvert and an extrovert — depends entirely on which of them you're asking.
The hard part about a Gemini: you never know if today's version wants to talk until sunrise, or wants to leave you on read.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius traits — quirky, intellectual, appears social but needs solitude, slips out early

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座可以在短短的場合裡，演得比誰都外向，
然後在你還沒發現的時候，悄悄消失。

他不是不喜歡你們，他只是需要一個人靜一靜，把剛剛那些對話好好想完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個看起來很合群、卻常常人間蒸發的水瓶朋友，他懂你懂他
variations: 水瓶座的友善是真的，獨處的需求也是真的，這兩件事在他身上一點都不衝突。
找水瓶座最好的方式不是把他拉進人群，而是給他空間，他自己會回來。

en.content:
An Aquarius can act more extroverted than anyone in a brief encounter,
and then quietly disappear before you even notice they're gone.

It's not that they don't like you. They just need to be alone for a bit to finish processing all those conversations.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius who seems super social but keeps vanishing into thin air — they'll feel seen
variations: An Aquarius's friendliness is real, and so is their need for solitude. On them, those two things don't conflict at all.
The best way to keep an Aquarius around isn't dragging them into the crowd — it's giving them space. They'll come back on their own.

items.sourceNote: Leo with a crush — dramatic, shows off, posts thirst traps, either treats you like royalty or plays it cool badly

zh-tw.content:
獅子座暗戀一個人的時候只有兩種模式：
把你捧成全世界的中心，或是假裝你根本不存在，因為他在裝酷。

劇透一下：他一點都不酷，那則限動的角度他喬了二十分鐘。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個最近一直發美照、又故意已讀不回的獅子朋友，他會惱羞
variations: 獅子座喜歡你的時候會突然變得很會發限動，每一張都在問「你有沒有看到我」。
獅子座的曖昧很好認：他不是在表演才華，就是在表演自己今天有多好看。

en.content:
A Leo with a crush only has two modes:
treating you like royalty, or pretending you don't exist because they're playing it cool.

Spoiler: they are not cool. They spent twenty minutes picking the angle on that story post.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo who's suddenly posting glow-up selfies and leaving you on read on purpose — they'll get flustered
variations: When a Leo likes you, they suddenly become a Story-posting machine, and every single one is asking 'did you see me yet?'
A Leo's crush is easy to spot: they're either showing off their talent, or showing off how good they look today.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio with a crush — guarded, intense eye contact, cryptic messages, secretly freaking out

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座喜歡你的時候，表面看起來什麼都沒變，
但他已經把你過去三年的貼文翻完，記得你提過一次的咖啡口味。

那個盯著你看又馬上移開的眼神？他內心其實正在天崩地裂。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給那個城府很深、絕不會主動承認喜歡誰的天蠍朋友，讓他知道你看穿了
variations: 天蠍座不會說「我喜歡你」，他只會默默記住你所有的細節，然後在某天突然全部用上。
天蠍座的曖昧是場推理劇：眼神很深、訊息很短，但每一個動作都藏著線索。

en.content:
When a Scorpio has a crush, nothing on the surface seems to change,
but they've already scrolled three years deep into your posts and memorized the coffee order you mentioned once.

That intense stare they snap away from the second you notice? Inside, they're completely falling apart.
en.editorNote: Send to the guarded Scorpio who would never admit who they like — let them know you've got them figured out
variations: A Scorpio won't say 'I like you.' They'll just quietly memorize every detail about you and deploy it all one day out of nowhere.
A Scorpio crush is a mystery novel: deep stares, short messages, but every move is hiding a clue.

items.sourceNote: Virgo with a crush — analyzes feelings like a puzzle, helps practically, lightly roasts and corrects grammar as flirting

zh-tw.content:
處女座不會直接告白，他會先把自己的感覺當成一道題目，反覆驗算三遍確認沒算錯。

等他開始默默幫你修東西、糾正你的錯字、在你還沒開口前就確認你有沒有吃飯——恭喜，這就是處女座的告白。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個明明很關心你、卻只會用碎念表達的處女朋友，他大概會說「我只是看不下去而已」
variations: 處女座喜歡你的方式不是甜言蜜語，是默默把你的生活打理得有條有理。
處女座開始輕輕吐槽你、順手幫你解決問題的時候，他其實已經淪陷很久了。

en.content:
A Virgo won't confess outright. First they treat their own feelings like a math problem, re-checking the answer three times to make sure they didn't mess it up.

Once they start quietly fixing your stuff, correcting your typos, and making sure you've eaten before you even say a word — congrats, that IS the Virgo confession.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo who clearly cares but only shows it through nagging — they'll say 'I just couldn't stand watching you struggle'
variations: A Virgo doesn't crush with sweet talk — they crush by quietly getting your whole life organized.
When a Virgo starts lightly roasting you and casually solving your problems, they've actually been gone for you for a long time.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius — firmly extroverted, friendliest sign of the zodiac, energized by people and new experiences

zh-tw.content:
射手座是那種可以跟剛認識五分鐘的人，聊得像認識五年的朋友。

他不是社交達人——他只是真心覺得，世界上每一個人身上都有一段他還沒聽過的故事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個走到哪交朋友到哪、永遠在揪人出去玩的射手朋友，他看了會笑著說「對啊不然咧」
variations: 射手座的電話簿裡有一半的人，連他自己都想不起來是在哪認識的，但他們都聊得很開心。
把射手座一個人關在家太久是一種懲罰，他需要新的人、新的地方、新的故事來充電。

en.content:
A Sagittarius is the kind of person who can talk to someone they met five minutes ago like they've been friends for five years.

They're not a social genius. They just genuinely believe every single person out there is carrying a story they haven't heard yet.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius who makes friends everywhere and is always rounding people up for a trip — they'll grin and say 'yeah, obviously'
variations: Half the people in a Sagittarius's contacts are folks even they can't remember meeting — but they all had a great time talking.
Locking a Sagittarius at home too long is a punishment. They recharge on new people, new places, and new stories.

items.sourceNote: Pisces — introverted dreamers, live in their own world, secretly very funny and silly to their inner circle

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座在陌生人面前安靜得像一幅畫，
但你只要進到他的小圈圈裡，就會發現他其實有夠瘋、有夠好笑。

他不是慢熟——他只是把最好笑的那一面，留給願意走進他世界的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個外表文靜、熟了之後卻超中二的雙魚朋友，他會說「噓，不要破壞我的人設」
variations: 雙魚座的安靜是保護色，真正的他活在一個只有少數人拿得到門票的小宇宙裡。
別被雙魚座的氣質騙了，他腦袋裡每天上演的劇情，比任何連續劇都還精彩。

en.content:
A Pisces is as quiet as a painting in front of strangers,
but the moment you get into their inner circle, you find out they're actually unhinged and hilarious.

They're not slow to warm up. They just save their funniest side for the people willing to step into their world.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces who looks serene but turns out to be a total goofball once you know them — they'll say 'shhh, don't blow my cover'
variations: A Pisces's quiet is camouflage. The real them lives in a little universe only a handful of people get a ticket to.
Don't be fooled by a Pisces's dreamy vibe — the drama running in their head daily beats any TV series.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio — grandmaster of being petty without making it obvious, quietly remembers everything and uses it when you least expect it

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座表面上對你笑笑的，好像什麼事都過去了，
但其實他心裡有一本帳，連你三年前隨口說的那句話都記得清清楚楚。

他不是愛記仇——他只是從來不假裝自己忘記了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個看起來很大方、其實默默把每一筆都記下來的天蠍朋友，他會回你一個意味深長的微笑
variations: 惹到天蠍座最可怕的地方是，他當下完全不動聲色，等你以為沒事了，他才慢慢讓你知道什麼叫後果。
天蠍座的記性好到可以當證人，尤其是針對得罪過他的人。

en.content:
A Scorpio smiles at you like everything's water under the bridge,
but they're actually keeping a ledger, and they remember that thing you mumbled three years ago word for word.

They don't love holding grudges. They just never pretend they forgot.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio who seems easygoing but quietly logs every receipt — they'll reply with a knowing little smile
variations: The scary part about crossing a Scorpio is they show nothing in the moment. Then just when you think it's over, they let you find out what consequences mean.
A Scorpio's memory is reliable enough to testify in court — especially against anyone who wronged them.

items.sourceNote: Taurus — laid-back, low-key, delivers a withering hilarious comment quietly to the person next to them

zh-tw.content:
金牛座不會在一群人面前搶著講笑話，
他只會在你耳邊小聲補一句，然後讓你笑到岔氣、還不能笑出聲。

他不是安靜——他只是把最毒的吐槽，留給坐在他旁邊的那個幸運兒。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個平常很安靜、一開口吐槽就讓你笑到內傷的金牛朋友，他會說「不然你以為我都在想什麼」
variations: 金牛座的幽默是低音量、高殺傷力，只有坐在他旁邊的人才聽得到，但也只有那個人會笑到流淚。
別被金牛座的面無表情騙了，他腦袋裡正在進行一場精彩的吐槽大會。

en.content:
A Taurus won't fight to tell jokes in front of a crowd.
They'll just mutter one line in your ear and leave you cracking up while trying desperately not to laugh out loud.

They're not quiet. They just save their most savage commentary for the lucky person sitting next to them.
en.editorNote: Send to the low-key Taurus whose one whispered comment ruins you — they'll say 'what did you think I was thinking about over here?'
variations: A Taurus's humor is low volume, high damage. Only the person beside them hears it, and only that person ends up in tears.
Don't be fooled by a Taurus's blank face — there's a full roast running behind it.

items.sourceNote: Aries — flares up in the moment then cools off just as fast, calls you out but doesn't stay angry

zh-tw.content:
牡羊座生氣的時候真的很大聲，當下會把話講得超直、超難聽，
但你只要過個十分鐘回頭看他，他已經在問你「欸要不要去吃飯」。

他不是沒脾氣——他只是懶得把氣留到隔天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個吵架吵得很兇、轉頭就忘記在氣什麼的牡羊朋友，他會說「對啊我幹嘛跟自己過不去」
variations: 跟牡羊座吵架最大的好處是，他不會冷戰，因為他根本沒耐心冷戰。
牡羊座的怒氣像煙火，砰一聲很燦爛，然後三秒就散了。

en.content:
When an Aries is mad, they're LOUD. In the moment they'll say the bluntest, harshest stuff possible.
But give it ten minutes and you'll turn around to find them asking 'hey, you wanna grab food?'

They don't lack a temper. They just can't be bothered to carry it into tomorrow.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aries who blows up hard then forgets what they were even mad about — they'll say 'right, why would I do that to myself?'
variations: The best part of fighting with an Aries is there's no silent treatment — they don't have the patience for one.
An Aries's anger is like fireworks: a big dazzling bang, then gone in three seconds.

items.sourceNote: Virgo — sharp sarcasm delivered with a straight face, leaving people unsure if they were serious or just funny

zh-tw.content:
處女座說話的時候一臉認真，
讓你完全分不清楚他到底是在嗆你，還是在開玩笑。

他不是難相處——他只是把毒舌講得太面不改色，連你都懷疑是不是自己想太多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個吐槽你還一臉無辜的處女朋友，他會說「我哪有，我只是陳述事實」
variations: 處女座的嘴砲最高境界是，你被嗆完還要回家想三分鐘，才發現剛剛被酸了。
處女座一本正經地說反話，是你今天會懷疑人生的主要原因。

en.content:
A Virgo says everything with a completely straight face,
so you genuinely can't tell if they're roasting you or just joking.

They're not hard to get along with. They just deliver their sarcasm so deadpan that you start wondering if you're the one overthinking it.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo who roasts you with an innocent face — they'll say 'I didn't do anything, I just stated a fact'
variations: The peak of a Virgo's sarcasm is when you get home, think for three minutes, and only then realize you got dragged.
A Virgo saying the opposite of what they mean with a serious face is the main reason you'll question your life today.

items.sourceNote: Pisces — quiet and respectful in public but secretly the silliest, funniest person inside their small inner circle

zh-tw.content:
雙魚座在外面安安靜靜、有禮貌、從不插話，
看起來就是個乖乖的邊緣人。

但只要進到他那幾個人的小圈圈，他就會原形畢露——
是全場最吵、最幼稚、最好笑的那個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個在群裡安靜、私下卻超中二的雙魚朋友，他會回你一串貼圖
variations: 雙魚座的安靜是有條件的：人多就裝乖，剩自己人就開始發瘋。
你以為雙魚座很文靜，那是因為你還沒被分到他的內圈。

en.content:
In public, a Pisces is quiet, polite, and never talks over anyone —
basically the well-behaved wallflower.

But the moment they're in their tiny inner circle, the mask drops:
they're suddenly the loudest, silliest, funniest person in the room.
en.editorNote: Send to the Pisces who's silent in the group chat but unhinged in private — they'll just reply with a wall of stickers
variations: A Pisces's quietness has conditions: stranger danger means angel mode, but with their people it's full chaos.
You think a Pisces is shy? That just means you haven't been promoted to the inner circle yet.

items.sourceNote: Libra — smiles politely at social events while internally desperate to leave

zh-tw.content:
天秤座可以一邊對你微笑，
一邊在心裡咬牙倒數還要待多久才能回家。

他不是假——他只是把「我超想走」這件事，包裝得很有禮貌而已。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個在聚會上笑得最得體、其實最想閃人的天秤朋友
variations: 天秤座的微笑分兩種：真心的，跟「我在算什麼時候可以離開」的。
天秤座最大的社交才能，是在很想走的時候還能笑得讓你看不出來。

en.content:
A Libra can smile warmly right at you
while internally counting down the minutes until they can go home.

It's not fake — they've just learned to wrap 'I desperately want to leave' in the politest packaging possible.
en.editorNote: Send to the Libra who looks the most composed at a party but is secretly plotting their exit
variations: A Libra has two smiles: the real one, and the 'calculating how soon I can dip' one.
A Libra's greatest social talent is wanting to leave so badly while smiling so well you'd never guess.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius — adventure first, plan later; unfiltered honesty with no regrets

zh-tw.content:
射手座的人生順序是：先出發，再來想要去哪。

計畫？那是回程的事。
至於講話有沒有過濾——他根本不知道過濾器長怎樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說走就走、講話又沒在客氣的射手朋友，他會說「不然咧」
variations: 射手座的旅行從來不靠攻略，靠的是「到了再說」的莫名自信。
射手座不是白目，他只是覺得把實話講出來比較省事。

en.content:
A Sagittarius's life order goes: leave first, figure out the destination later.

A plan? That's a problem for the way back.
And as for having a filter — they genuinely don't know what one looks like.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius who books a trip on a whim and says whatever's on their mind — they'll reply 'and?'
variations: A Sagittarius never travels with an itinerary, just an inexplicable confidence that it'll work out on arrival.
A Sagittarius isn't being rude — they just find blurting out the truth more efficient than sugarcoating it.

items.sourceNote: Capricorn — schedules rest like an appointment, stressed over made-up scenarios in their head

zh-tw.content:
摩羯座不會「放鬆」——
他們會把休息排進行事曆，像在跟自己開會。

而且就算坐下來休息，腦子裡還在為一個根本還沒發生的問題擔心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個連耍廢都要先規劃的摩羯朋友，他會說「不然怎麼確定有休到」
variations: 摩羯座的放假行程通常比上班還滿，因為他連休息都要有效率。
摩羯座煩惱的事有一半是自己腦補出來的劇本，而且還演得很投入。

en.content:
A Capricorn doesn't 'unwind' —
they schedule rest into their calendar like a meeting with themselves.

And even when they finally sit down to relax, their brain is still busy stressing over a problem that hasn't even happened yet.
en.editorNote: Send to the Capricorn who has to plan their downtime — they'll say 'how else would I know I actually rested?'
variations: A Capricorn's day off is usually more packed than a workday, because even resting has to be efficient.
Half of what a Capricorn worries about is a made-up scenario in their head — and they're fully committed to the performance.

items.sourceNote: Aquarius — most introverted sign, happy alone, ghosts everyone equally, small talk feels like a TED talk

zh-tw.content:
水瓶座不是在已讀你——
他是公平地已讀全世界。

他真的很享受一個人的時間，外加那兩三個不會逼他講話的朋友，這樣就夠了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個訊息常常已讀不回、但你知道他沒有惡意的水瓶朋友
variations: 水瓶座的「失蹤」沒有針對誰，他只是暫時對全人類關機而已。
跟水瓶座聊天，閒聊兩句他能扯到宇宙與人生意義，讓你不知道怎麼接。

en.content:
An Aquarius isn't leaving you on read —
they're leaving the entire world on read, fairly and equally.

They genuinely love their own company, plus the two or three friends who don't force them to talk. That's plenty.
en.editorNote: Send to the Aquarius who often goes quiet but you know means nothing by it
variations: An Aquarius's disappearing act isn't personal — they've just temporarily powered down on all of humanity.
Try to make small talk with an Aquarius and two sentences later they're discussing the universe and the meaning of life, leaving you with nowhere to go.

items.sourceNote: Gemini — dual personality, fast talker, argues with self and wins, two moods one body

zh-tw.content:
雙子座不是情緒不穩定——
他只是同時開了兩個分身，而那兩個分身正在吵架。

最可怕的是，他自己跟自己辯論，最後還是他贏。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個五分鐘前說想出門、現在又說好累不想動的雙子朋友
variations: 雙子座的腦袋裡同時有十個分頁在跑，難怪他講話可以一句接著八個話題。
問雙子座要吃什麼，他能在「都可以」跟「我超挑」之間瞬間切換，而且兩個都是真心話。

en.content:
A Gemini isn't moody —
they just have two versions of themselves running at once, and those two are currently arguing.
