The scary part? They debate themselves all day, and somehow they always win.
en.editorNote: Send to the Gemini who said they wanted to go out five minutes ago and now claims they're too tired to move
variations: A Gemini's brain has ten tabs open at all times — no wonder one sentence somehow branches into eight different topics.
Ask a Gemini what they want to eat and they'll flip between 'anything's fine' and 'I'm super picky' in a second, and both are completely sincere.

items.sourceNote: Leo — needs attention, confident lifestyle, thinks the sun rises for them, applause optional

zh-tw.content:
獅子座需要的不是掌聲——
是注目。掌聲只是附加的福利。

他不是覺得世界繞著他轉，他只是覺得，如果不繞著他轉，那也太可惜了一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個進房間三秒內就變成全場焦點的獅子朋友，他會大方收下這個稱讚
variations: 獅子座的自信不是裝出來的，是內建的，連他自己都沒辦法關掉。
獅子座可以一整天不被需要，但絕對受不了一整天不被看見。

en.content:
What a Leo needs isn't applause —
it's attention. The applause is just a nice bonus.

It's not that they think the world revolves around them. They just think it'd be a real shame if it didn't.
en.editorNote: Send to the Leo who becomes the center of the room within three seconds of walking in — they'll happily accept the compliment
variations: A Leo's confidence isn't an act, it's built-in — even they can't switch it off.
A Leo can survive a whole day without being needed, but absolutely cannot handle a whole day without being seen.

items.sourceNote: Scorpio — notices everything but pretends not to, mysterious, quietly judging, intense

zh-tw.content:
天蠍座什麼都注意到了——
只是他選擇假裝沒看到。

你以為他沒在聽，其實他連你三句話前語氣的變化都記下來了，只是懶得拆穿你而已。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個話不多、但你總覺得他什麼都知道的天蠍朋友
variations: 天蠍座的沉默不是沒意見，是他正在默默把一切都看穿，然後決定不說。
別在天蠍座面前演戲，他不是不知道，他只是給你留個面子。

en.content:
A Scorpio noticed everything —
they just chose to act like they didn't.

You think they weren't listening? They clocked the shift in your tone three sentences ago. They just couldn't be bothered to call you out.
en.editorNote: Send to the Scorpio who barely says a word but somehow always seems to know everything
variations: A Scorpio's silence isn't a lack of opinion — it's them quietly seeing right through everything and deciding to stay quiet.
Don't put on an act in front of a Scorpio. It's not that they can't tell — they're just letting you save face.

items.sourceNote: Virgo — perfectionist, critical, tidy, first to leave the party, overthinks details

zh-tw.content:
處女座不是龜毛——
他只是看得到別人看不到的那個歪掉一公分的細節，而且沒辦法假裝沒看到。

他通常是聚會裡第一個悄悄離場的人，因為人多到一個程度，他的腦袋就開始默默幫所有人收場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個會默默把你桌上歪掉的杯子轉正、但什麼都沒說的處女朋友
variations: 處女座的標準不是針對你，是針對全世界，包括他自己，而且對自己最嚴。
處女座嘴上說「沒關係都可以」，但他的眼睛已經把那個沒對齊的地方掃了三遍。

en.content:
A Virgo isn't nitpicky —
they just see the one detail that's off by a centimeter, the one nobody else notices, and they physically cannot pretend they didn't.

They're usually the first to quietly slip out of a gathering, because past a certain headcount their brain starts mentally tidying up after everyone.
en.editorNote: Send to the Virgo who silently straightens the crooked cup on your table and says nothing about it
variations: A Virgo's high standards aren't aimed at you — they're aimed at the whole world, themselves included, and hardest of all at themselves.
A Virgo will say 'it's fine, whatever works,' while their eyes have already scanned that misaligned thing three times.

items.sourceNote: Sagittarius — most extroverted, friendly, makes small talk with anyone, freedom-loving, adventure seeker

zh-tw.content:
射手座可以跟任何人聊起來——
排隊三分鐘，他能跟前面的陌生人變成朋友，還順便約好下次一起去爬山。

他不是怕無聊，他是真的覺得這世界太大，待在同一個地方太久是一種損失。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說走就走、永遠在計畫下一趟旅行的射手朋友
variations: 射手座最受不了的不是吵架，是被困住——身體被困住，或心被困住，他都會想跑。
問射手座週末要幹嘛，他的答案常常是「還不知道，但一定不會待在家」。

en.content:
A Sagittarius can strike up a conversation with literally anyone —
three minutes in a line and they've befriended the stranger ahead of them, plus made plans to go hiking next weekend.

It's not that they're scared of being bored. They genuinely feel the world is too big, and staying in one place too long counts as a loss.
en.editorNote: Send to the Sagittarius who's always ready to drop everything and is already planning their next trip
variations: What a Sagittarius can't stand isn't a fight — it's being trapped. Trap their body or their heart and they'll want to bolt.
Ask a Sagittarius what they're doing this weekend and the answer is usually 'no idea yet, but definitely not staying home.'
